title: Exactly solvable non-planar $\mathbb{Z}_{2}$ dimer liquids on checkerboard and ruby lattices
summary: We generalize an influential framework for exactly solvable quantum dimer models with dual Ising gauge theory descriptions realizing the $\mathbb{Z}_{2}$ topological phase from trivalent to tetravalent parent lattices. The resulting quantum dimer models live on crossed-medial lattices and possess the remarkable feature of having crossed plaquettes, leading to transition graphs with generically intersecting loops. This non-planar structure runs counter to established templates for analytically tractable dimer liquids. As the simplest realization of the construction, we introduce an exactly solvable quantum dimer model on the checkerboard lattice that allows an exact mapping to the toric code, thus providing a particularly direct connection between the latter and Anderson's short range resonating valence bond paradigm. We further show that a corresponding crossed ruby lattice construction, dual to an Ising gauge theory on the kagome lattice, naturally falls within the same framework. More generally, the construction gives rise to a broad class of exactly solvable crossed-medial quantum dimer models and admits natural iteration, generating cascades of solvable $\mathbb{Z}_{2}$ topological dimer liquids beyond the standard planar setting. We furthermore extend Kasteleyn methods to the relevant non-planar graphs, enabling controlled wave-function deformations away from the commuting-projector points while retaining efficient evaluation of correlation functions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从三价母格推广到四价母格的精确可解量子二聚体模型框架，在交叉- medial格点上构造了具有交叉plaquette的非平面二聚体模型，实现了与toric code的直接映射，并拓展了Kasteleyn方法以处理非平面图上的波函数形变。
AI.motivation: 现有精确可解量子二聚体模型局限于三价母格（如蜂窝格）和平面结构，无法处理更一般的四价母格和非平面拓扑结构。作者希望突破这一限制，建立更广泛的精确可解框架。
AI.method: 1) 将dual Ising gauge theory框架从trivalent推广到tetravalent母格；2) 在crossed-medial格点上构造量子二聚体模型；3) 以checkerboard格为例建立与toric code的精确映射；4) 构造crossed ruby格模型；5) 发展非平面图上的Kasteleyn方法。
AI.result: 成功构建了checkerboard格上的精确可解量子二聚体模型，实现了向toric code的直接映射；展示了kagome格Ising规范理论对应的crossed ruby格构造；建立了非平面图上Kasteleyn方法的扩展。
AI.conclusion: 该工作将精确可解量子二聚体模型从平面、三价格点扩展到非平面、四价格点，开辟了更丰富的Z2拓扑二聚体液相家族，并为非平面图上的波函数形变提供了可控计算工具。

title: Atomic-scale visualization of the toroidal order in a trimeric Dy(III) single-molecule toroic
summary: Single-molecule toroics (SMTs) offer a unique platform for next-generation quantum devices utilizing head-to-tail spin alignments in the compounds. Presence of toroidal moments in SMTs has been essentially based on magnetometry and ab initio calculations. Here, we report observation and probe of the toroidal moment in [Dy3(OH)(teaH2)3(paa)3]Cl(OMe) [teaH3: triethanolamine; paaH: N-(2-pyridyl)-acetoacetamide] from mapping of Dy3+ magnetic susceptibility tensors by polarized neutron diffraction (PND). Neutron diffraction under variable magnetic fields demonstrates field-induced magnetization along the c-axis with toroidal moments anti-parallelly stacked, providing definite proof of the toroidal moment. Magnetometry studies confirm the toroidal ground state. For the first time, the combined use of PND, variable-field neutron diffraction, ab initio calculations, and magnetometry is introduced as a robust and quantitative methodology to probe molecular-scale toroidal magnetism. This integrated approach overcomes limitations of earlier indirect methods, establishes a benchmark framework for investigating SMTs, and provides valuable insights for the design of molecular quantum materials.

AI.tldr: 本文通过极化中子衍射（PND）首次直接观测并证明了[Dy3(OH)(teaH2)3(paa)3]+化合物中的环形磁矩，结合变场中子衍射、ab initio计算和磁力测量，建立了一套定量探测分子尺度环形磁性的综合方法，为单分子环形化合物（SMTs）研究提供了基准框架。
AI.motivation: 单分子环形化合物（SMTs）因其首尾相连的自旋排列，有望用于下一代量子器件。然而，此前对环形磁矩的探测主要依赖磁力测量和ab initio计算等间接方法，缺乏直接实验观测手段，亟需建立更可靠的定量探测方法。
AI.method: 首次联合使用极化中子衍射（PND）、变场中子衍射、ab initio计算和磁力测量四种技术，对[Dy3(OH)(teaH2)3(paa)3]Cl(OMe)中Dy3+的磁化率张量进行映射与环形磁矩的定量探测。
AI.result: 中子衍射在变磁场下观察到沿c轴的场致磁化，且环形矩呈反平行堆叠，直接证明了环形磁矩的存在；磁力测量确认了环形基态。
AI.conclusion: 该综合方法克服了此前间接方法的局限性，为SMTs研究建立了定量基准框架，并为分子量子材料的设计提供了重要指导。

title: Correlation-driven phonon renormalisation and the equation of state of $γ$-cerium
summary: We investigate the thermodynamic properties of elemental cerium by assessing the crucial role of phonon free energy within the framework of dynamical mean-field theory (DMFT). While conventional density functional theory (DFT) often fails to capture the intricate energy landscape of $f$-electron materials, our approach integrates many-body electronic correlations with lattice dynamics to achieve a more rigorous description of the equation of state. We calculate the total energy as a function of the lattice constant at both the DFT and DFT+DMFT levels, subsequently incorporating the vibrational free energy derived from the phonon density of states. Our findings reveal that electronic renormalisation of the force constants significantly alters the phonon spectra, particularly in the strongly correlated $γ$-phase. By applying these phonon corrections to the energy profiles, we observe a substantial refinement in the predicted equilibrium volumes. Using principal-component-based machine learning, we interpolate phonon dispersions continuously from a finite set of first-principles calculations and compare them to experiment, finding significantly closer agreement compared to conventional DFT and DFT+U calculations that neglect dynamical many-body correlations. This study underlines the necessity of accounting for both electronic and vibrational entropy when evaluating the phase stability and structural transitions of lanthanide systems under varying pressures and temperatures.

AI.tldr: 本文在DMFT框架下研究了铈元素的热力学性质，通过结合电子关联和声子自由能，发现电子重整化显著改变声子谱，尤其是γ相，从而更精确地预测平衡体积，并利用机器学习插值声子色散，结果优于传统DFT和DFT+U方法。
AI.motivation: 传统DFT无法准确描述f电子材料的复杂能量景观，需要将多体电子关联与晶格动力学相结合，以更严谨地描述铈的状态方程和相稳定性。
AI.method: 在DFT和DFT+DMFT水平上计算总能量随晶格常数的变化，加入从声子态密度推导的振动自由能；利用基于主成分分析的机器学习从有限的第一性原理计算中连续插值声子色散。
AI.result: 电子重整化显著改变了声子谱（尤其γ相）；施加声子修正后，预测的平衡体积得到显著改善；机器学习插值的声子色散与实验吻合度远优于传统DFT和DFT+U。
AI.conclusion: 在研究镧系元素在变化压力和温度下的相稳定性和结构转变时，必须同时考虑电子熵和振动熵。

title: Coherent manipulation of Kondo Majoranas in two-channel Kondo setups
summary: We study coherent manipulation of Majorana zero modes emerging in overscreened two-channel Kondo systems. Using compactified lattice models, we show that these interacting Kondo Majoranas support non-local qubits and admit teleportation, fusion, and braiding operations. In particular, we identify a distinction between non-topological and genuinely topological Y-junction geometries, the latter realizing a non-Abelian geometric holonomy. Our results establish a proof-of-principle route toward coherent control of non-Abelian anyons beyond conventional free-fermion platforms.

AI.tldr: 本文研究过筛双通道Kondo系统中涌现的马约拉纳零模的相干操控，证明其支持非局域量子比特，并实现了隐形传态、融合和编织操作，特别是区分了非拓扑与拓扑Y结几何结构，为超越自由费米子系统的非阿贝尔任意子相干控制提供了原理性验证。
AI.motivation: 探索在相互作用的多通道Kondo系统中能否实现Majorana零模的相干操控，突破传统自由费米子平台局限，为拓扑量子计算寻找新的物理实现途径。
AI.method: 采用紧致化格点模型对过筛双通道Kondo系统进行理论分析，研究其中Majorana零模的量子操控性质，包括隐形传态、融合和编织操作，并比较不同Y结几何结构的拓扑特性。
AI.result: 证明了相互作用Kondo Majorana系统支持非局域量子比特及其基本操控操作；明确了非拓扑与拓扑Y结几何结构的区别，后者可实现非阿贝尔几何规范场。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了超越传统自由费米子平台、在强关联系统中实现非阿贝尔任意子相干控制的原理性路线。

title: Quantum Otto and Carnot Cycles via Skew Ising Model
summary: We investigate the thermodynamic performance of quantum heat engines and refrigerators based on a two-spin system subject to a skew magnetic field. The working substance is described by an interacting spin model that incorporates both spin--spin coupling and anisotropy induced by a tilted magnetic field. We analyze and compare quantum Carnot and Otto cycles, showing that the Carnot cycle exhibits a universal, entropy-driven behavior with smooth phase boundaries, while the Otto cycle displays a much richer structure governed by the interplay between the energy spectrum and nonequilibrium population differences. In particular, we identify a crossover in both efficiency and coefficient of performance as a function of the interaction strength, which arises from the competition between the interaction energy scale and the magnetic field. We further demonstrate that the skew angle induces state hybridization, modifying both the energy levels and occupation probabilities. Our results highlight that interactions and anisotropy, when properly tuned, can enhance thermodynamic performance, and emphasize the importance of multi-level effects in the design of quantum thermal machines.

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于两自旋系统在倾斜磁场中的量子热机和制冷机热力学性能，比较了卡诺循环和奥托循环，发现相互作用和各向异性可提升热力学性能。
AI.motivation: 探究自旋-自旋耦合和倾斜磁场引起的各向异性对量子热机和制冷机热力学性能的影响，揭示多能级效应在量子热机设计中的重要性。
AI.method: 采用两自旋相互作用模型，考虑倾斜磁场诱导的各向异性，分别分析量子卡诺循环和奥托循环的热力学性能，比较两者的效率、制冷系数等指标。
AI.result: 卡诺循环表现出普适的熵驱动行为和平滑的相边界；奥托循环呈现更丰富的结构；识别出效率和制冷系数随相互作用强度的交叉行为；倾斜角度引起态杂交，改变能级和占据概率。
AI.conclusion: 相互作用和各向异性在适当调节下可增强热力学性能，多能级效应对量子热机设计至关重要。

title: Fabry-Perot Interference, g-factor Anisotropy, and Gate-Tunable Quantum dot in Chiral Tellurium Nanowires
comment: Main text 25 pages, 6 figures, SI 3 figures
summary: Chiral materials with strong spin-orbit coupling offer a unique platform for exploring the interplay between topology, chirality, and quantum transport yet the quantum coherent regime in elemental tellurium nanostructures remains largely unexplored. Here we demonstrate phase-coherent quasi-ballistic transport, anisotropic Zeeman spectroscopy, and gate-tunable quantum dot formation in hydrothermally grown t-tellurium nanowires. Single nanowire field-effect transistors exhibit p-type transport with hole mobilities rising from approx. 80 cm2 V-1 s-1 at 210 K to approx. 190 cm2 V-1 s-1 at 1 K, consistent with a crossover from phonon-limited to Coulomb scattering dominated regimes near 50 K. Notably, devices segregate into two distinct regimes based on their room temperature two-terminal resistance : low-resistance devices (< 30 kOhm) exhibit Fabry-Perot interference, whereas high resistance devices (> 30 kOhm) display Coulomb-blockade behavior revealing a two-terminal resistance-driven transition between quasi-ballistic and strongly localized transport regimes. Zeeman spectroscopy in in-plane and out-of-plane magnetic fields yields highly anisotropic Lande g-factors (an in-plane gparallel = 1.18 and an out-of-plane gperp = 18.41) and directly resolves a spin-orbit energy gap DeltaSO = 0.864 meV from an avoided crossing. These results establish chiral tellurium nanowires as a versatile platform for gate-defined spin qubits exploiting large, tunable g-factors and for hybrid tellurium-superconductor architectures targeting Majorana zero modes in an elemental vdW system.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了水热法生长的碲纳米线中的准弹道输运、各向异性塞曼光谱和栅极可调量子点行为，揭示了从准弹道到强局域化输运的转变，并测得高度各向异性的g因子和自旋轨道能隙。
AI.motivation: 强自旋轨道耦合的手性材料为探索拓扑、手性和量子输运的相互作用提供了独特平台，但元素碲纳米结构中的量子相干区尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 采用水热法生长t-碲纳米线，制备单纳米线场效应晶体管，通过低温电输运测量、塞曼谱学和栅极调控研究其量子输运特性。
AI.result: 空穴迁移率从210 K的~80 cm²/V·s升至1 K的~190 cm²/V·s；器件分为低阻(<30 kΩ，法布里-珀罗干涉)和高阻(>30 kΩ，库仑阻塞)两类；测得高度各向异性g因子(g∥=1.18, g⊥=18.41)和ΔSO=0.864 meV的自旋轨道能隙。
AI.conclusion: 手性碲纳米线是栅极定义自旋量子比特和碲-超导混合架构（用于马约拉纳零模）的多功能平台。

title: A Physics-Informed B-Spline Framework for Continuous Approximation of Flow Data
summary: Continuous approximations of flow data are useful for downstream analysis, differentiation, and visualization, but purely data-driven reconstructions do not, in general, preserve the governing physics. This limitation becomes particularly important when input data are physically inconsistent, whether due to low-fidelity discretizations or unmodeled discrepancies. In such cases, reconstructed fields may exhibit inaccurate PDE residuals, violated balance laws, or unreliable derived quantities. To address this, we propose a physics-informed B-spline framework that embeds physical constraints directly into the reconstruction process. The method constructs compact, continuously differentiable representations of discrete fields using tensor-product B-splines and determines spline control points by solving an optimization problem balancing data fidelity with residuals of the governing PDEs, alongside initial and boundary conditions. Leveraging exact analytical derivatives of the B-spline basis enables efficient and accurate evaluation of physical residuals without storing full-resolution fields. We refer to this approach as physics-informed multivariate functional approximation (PI-MFA). Numerical studies on the 1D convection-diffusion, 2D coupled Burgers, and 2D incompressible Navier-Stokes equations show PI-MFA reduces PDE residuals and improves global balance-law consistency. Compared with standard and regularized MFA, PI-MFA produces more physically faithful reconstructions and, for physically inconsistent data, lower approximation errors, while offering computational advantages over tested physics-informed neural networks. Overall, PI-MFA preserves the compactness, local support, and exact differentiability of classical spline spaces while producing reliable continuous flow fields for scientific analysis and visualization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种物理信息B样条框架（PI-MFA），通过将物理约束嵌入重建过程，在保持B样条紧致性、局部支持和精确可微性的同时，生成符合物理规律的连续流场，在1D对流扩散、2D耦合Burgers和2D不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程上验证了其降低PDE残差和提高全局平衡律一致性的能力。
AI.motivation: 纯数据驱动的流场重建方法无法保证物理一致性，当输入数据存在物理不一致（如低保真离散化或未建模偏差）时，重建场可能呈现不准确的PDE残差、违反守恒律或产生不可靠的派生量，亟需一种能嵌入物理约束的重建方法。
AI.method: 利用张量积B样条构建流场的紧致连续可微表示，通过优化问题求解样条控制点，在数据保真度与PDE残差、初始/边界条件之间取得平衡；利用B样条基函数的解析导数高效精确评估物理残差，无需存储全分辨率场。
AI.result: 在1D对流扩散、2D耦合Burgers和2D不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程上的数值研究表明，PI-MFA能够降低PDE残差并提升全局守恒律一致性；相比标准MFA和正则化MFA，PI-MFA产生更符合物理的重建结果；对于物理不一致的数据，PI-MFA在降低近似误差的同时，相比物理信息神经网络具有计算优势。
AI.conclusion: PI-MFA在保持经典样条空间的紧致性、局部支持和精确可微性的同时，为科学分析和可视化生成可靠的连续流场，为物理不一致数据的重建提供了一种有效的解决方案。

title: Quantum-geometric origin of superfluid weight in quasicrystals with critical states
summary: A distinctive feature of many quasiperiodic systems is the presence of critical states that are neither extended nor exponentially localized. We investigate the geometric effect on the superfluid weight in quasiperiodic systems with critical states at zero temperature. We employ both real-space and momentum-space approaches to superfluid weight in quasicrystals, which allows us to separate the conventional and quantum geometric contributions. We find that the superfluid weight is dominated by the geometric contribution in quasiperiodic systems with critical states. This finding reveals a fundamental interplay between superconductivity and critical states in quasicrystals.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了准周期系统中临界态对超流体权重的影响，发现几何贡献在临界态占主导地位，揭示了超导与临界态之间的基本相互作用。
AI.motivation: 准周期系统的一个独特特征是在临界态（既非扩展态也非指数局域态），但其对超流体权重的影响尚不明确，作者旨在探究临界态下的几何效应对超流体权重的贡献。
AI.method: 采用实空间和动量空间两种方法计算准晶中的超流体权重，将常规贡献与量子几何贡献分离。
AI.result: 在具有临界态的准周期系统中，超流体权重主要由几何贡献主导。
AI.conclusion: 该发现揭示了准晶中超导性与临界态之间存在基本相互作用，强调了几何效应在临界态系统中的重要性。

title: Anatomy of fast current-induced skyrmion motion in synthetic antiferromagnets
summary: The high mobility of current-driven skyrmions in synthetic antiferromagnets (SAFs) is widely explained by the macroscopic suppression of the skyrmion Hall effect through gyrotropic force compensation. This established view, however, overlooks a concurrent and significant reduction in the Gilbert damping parameter α, a key factor in the Thiele equation governing skyrmion velocity. Here, we show that this damping attenuation originates from a reconfigured magnon-electron scattering landscape. Using a microscopic s-d model, we demonstrate that the strong antiferromagnetic interlayer Ruderman-Kittel-Kasuya-Yosida (RKKY) exchange coupling in SAFs increases the magnonic gap of skyrmion collective modes, thereby suppressing the thermal magnon population and, consequently, the magnon-electron scattering rate that dominates damping in metallic ferromagnets. Our work establishes a dual-mechanism framework to fully explain the superior kinetics of SAF skyrmions: the macroscopic topological effect rectifies the motion direction, while the microscopic dissipation mechanism reduces the drag. This synergy enables high-speed and efficient motion, providing a fundamental elucidation of the enhanced mobility reported in recent studies such as the work by Pham et al. [Science 384, 307-312 (2024)].

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了合成反铁磁体中斯格明子高迁移率的新机制：除了已知的拓扑霍尔效应补偿外，反铁磁层间RKKY耦合增大了磁振子能隙，抑制了热磁振子布居，从而降低了磁振子-电子散射率（即Gilbert阻尼），实现了"宏观方向矫正+微观阻力降低"的双重机制。
AI.motivation: 挑战现有观点：合成反铁磁体中斯格明子高迁移率仅归因于拓扑霍尔效应的宏观抑制，忽视了Gilbert阻尼系数α的同步降低这一关键因素。
AI.method: 采用微观s-d模型分析，研究反铁磁层间RKKY交换耦合对磁振子能隙、热磁振子布居以及磁振子-电子散射率的影响。
AI.result: RKKY强耦合增大了斯格明子集体模式的磁振子能隙，抑制了热磁振子布居，从而降低了主导金属铁磁体阻尼的磁振子-电子散射率。
AI.conclusion: 建立了双重机制框架：宏观拓扑效应矫正运动方向，微观耗散机制降低阻力，两者协同实现SAF斯格明子的高速高效运动。

title: Electron Paramagnetic Resonance Study of Radical Species on NaNbO3@CeO2-Modified Carbon Vulcan XC72 Gas Diffusion Electrode for Electrochemical Degradation of Paracetamol via Electro-Fenton
summary: While electrochemical oxidation is a promising technology for water treatment, a fundamental understanding of the specific radical mechanisms involved in pharmaceutical degradation has remained limited. This study addresses this gap by employing Electron Paramagnetic Resonance (EPR) spectroscopy to directly quantify the radical species generated during the degradation of paracetamol using a novel gas diffusion electrode (GDE) modified with NaNbO3 nanocubes and CeO2 nanorods. This approach provides a critical advancement beyond prior literature by moving from indirect inference to direct, quantitative analysis of reactive species. Results demonstrated that a boron-doped diamond (BDD) anode (65% OH radical, 35% aryl radicals) drastically outperformed a Platinum (Pt) anode (74% OH radical, 26% aryl radicals), achieving complete degradation in 15 minutes versus 45 minutes and 81.6% versus 67.8% mineralization. Consequently, this work provides a foundational mechanistic framework that fundamentally advances the field, offering not just a more effective material system (BDD/NaNbO3@CeO2-GDE) but also a validated methodology for rationally designing and optimizing electrochemical water treatment processes based on quantifiable radical pathways.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过EPR光谱直接量化了电化学降解扑热息痛过程中的自由基种类，发现BDD阳极（65% OH自由基，35%芳基自由基）在15分钟内实现完全降解（矿化率81.6%），性能远超Pt阳极（45分钟，矿化率67.8%），为电化学水处理提供了基于可量化自由基路径的理性设计方法。
AI.motivation: 电化学氧化虽是前景广阔的水处理技术，但对药物降解中特定自由基机制的了解有限，以往研究仅能间接推断活性物种，缺乏直接定量分析手段。
AI.method: 采用电子顺磁共振（EPR）光谱直接定量检测采用NaNbO3纳米立方体和CeO2纳米棒改性的气体扩散电极（GDE）降解扑热息痛过程中产生的自由基种类。
AI.result: BDD阳极产生65% OH自由基和35%芳基自由基，15分钟完全降解，矿化率81.6%；Pt阳极产生74% OH自由基和26%芳基自由基，45分钟完成降解，矿化率67.8%。BDD性能显著优于Pt。
AI.conclusion: 本研究不仅提出了一种更有效的材料系统（BDD/NaNbO3@CeO2-GDE），更重要的是建立了一种基于可量化自由基路径来理性设计和优化电化学水处理过程的验证方法论，为电化学水处理领域提供了基础性机理框架。

title: Improved selector behavior in ultrathin chromium-doped V$_2$O$_3$ films
summary: Devices based on the negative differential resistance effect in chromium doped V$_2$O$_3$ are considered to be promising as selector elements for use in emerging memory technologies, as well as for neuromorphic applications. It is shown by electrical measurements, that the switching effect is maintained for very thin films down to 5 nm, and even improved properties such as a low leakage current and an abrupt transition are observed. For these thicknesses, the behavior of crystalline and amorphous films becomes very similar; most strikingly, a forming step is required in both. Transmission electron microscopy reveals this to be likely due to a thin amorphous layer that forms at the interface to the TiN electrode. Elemental mapping further shows a complex distribution of the chromium dopants, as well as a diffusion of Ti into the layer from the electrode, which might be responsible for the improved properties.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了铬掺杂V₂O₃薄膜中负微分电阻效应，发现即使薄膜薄至5 nm仍保持开关特性，且具有低泄漏电流和陡峭转变等改进性能，但需形成步骤。TEM揭示界面非晶层和元素扩散可能是性能改善的原因。
AI.motivation: 铬掺杂V₂O₃的负微分电阻效应器件有望作为新兴存储技术中的选择元件及神经形态应用，需要研究其在超薄尺度下的性能表现。
AI.method: 通过电学测量评估薄膜开关特性，使用透射电子显微镜(TEM)进行微观结构分析，结合元素映射观察掺杂剂和电极扩散分布。
AI.result: 5 nm超薄薄膜仍维持开关效应，且泄漏电流更低、转变更陡峭；晶体膜与非晶膜行为趋同，均需形成步骤；界面处形成非晶层，铬掺杂剂分布复杂，钛从电极扩散进入薄膜。
AI.conclusion: 超薄铬掺杂V₂O₃薄膜在保持负微分电阻开关特性的同时性能得到改善，界面非晶层和元素扩散是关键机制。

title: Computing phase diagrams using a convex hull algorithm
comment: Accepted for publication in Astronomy and Astrophysics
summary: We present a simple universal computational algorithm for computing compositional phase diagrams of rocks and their melts at given temperature and pressure. It makes use of the mathematical concept of the convex hull of a set of points in the space spanned by the composition and the Gibbs free energy. All the complexities of determining the stability or separation of phases, the localization and orientation of tie lines, as well as the determination of characteristic points, curves and surfaces such as the solidus, liquidus, solvus, and the eutectic/peritectic points etc, are taken care of by the algorithm that computes the convex hull, supplemented with an algorithm to physically classify the resulting simplices. For the convex hull computation, the publicly available Qhull package can be used, which is available in SciPy. This makes this method accessible and intuitive for a broad set of scientific and educational applications. Although the method is not practical for systems of a large number of components, it is remarkably stable and efficient for systems of up to four. We present our implementation of the method as a publicly available Python package.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用凸包算法计算岩石及熔体组分相图的通用计算方法，通过Qhull包实现，适用于最多四组分系统，并以Python包形式公开。
AI.motivation: 传统相图计算方法复杂且不易普及，作者希望开发一种简单、通用、直观的算法，能够自动处理相图中的各类复杂特征（如固相线、液相线、共晶点等），降低相图计算的门槛。
AI.method: 利用组分和吉布斯自由能构成的高维空间中的凸包（convex hull）概念，通过Qhull（SciPy中的公开包）计算凸包，并结合物理分类算法对得到的单纯形进行分类，从而自动确定相图中的稳定相、分离相、连线、特征点/曲线/曲面等。
AI.result: 该方法在最多四组分的系统中表现出显著的稳定性和效率，但对于更多组分的系统尚不实用。作者已将实现以Python包形式公开。
AI.conclusion: 该方法简单、直观、易于获取，适用于广泛的科学和教学场景，尤其适合最多四组分的岩石/熔体相图计算。

title: Higher-winding phases in one-dimensional non-Hermitian topological superconductors
summary: Non-Hermitian topological superconductors provide a setting in which point-gap topology, non-Hermitian skin effects, and Majorana zero modes are strongly intertwined. In this work, we adopt a coefficient-based approach for computing winding numbers and deriving analytical expressions for phase boundaries in one-dimensional non-Hermitian topological superconductors characterized by point-gap topology with $\mathbb{Z}$ invariants. We apply this approach to two non-Hermitian topological superconducting lattice models, with and without sublattice degrees of freedom, including longer-range hoppings, thereby accessing a much broader parameter space. These extensions generate higher-order polynomials and support phases with higher winding numbers, reflecting the underlying $\mathbb{Z}$ topology. We further clarify how a weak perturbation suppresses the non-Hermitian skin effect while preserving the sublattice-symmetry-protected invariant associated with Majorana zero modes. The predicted winding numbers are verified by open-boundary spectra, where one or multiple pairs of zero-energy boundary modes appear consistently with the bulk invariant. We also examine the stability of these modes against onsite disorder through the inverse participation ratio. Our results provide a systematic and efficient route to constructing topological phase diagrams for higher-winding non-Hermitian topological superconductors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于系数的方法，用于计算一维非厄米拓扑超导体中的缠绕数，并推导了相边界解析表达式，验证了高阶缠绕数与边界零能模的对应关系，同时探讨了无序对零模稳定性的影响。
AI.motivation: 非厄米拓扑超导体中，点隙拓扑、非厄米趋肤效应和马约拉纳零模之间存在强关联，但现有方法难以高效处理大参数空间下的拓扑相图，尤其是高缠绕数情况。
AI.method: 采用基于系数的方法计算缠绕数并推导相边界解析式，应用于两个一维非厄米拓扑超导晶格模型（含/不含子晶格自由度及长程跳跃），通过开路谱和逆参与率验证零模的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 该方法可处理更高阶多项式，支持更高缠绕数的拓扑相；弱扰动可抑制非厄米趋肤效应但不破坏子晶格对称性保护的马约拉纳零模；开路谱中出现与体缠绕数一致的单对或多对零能边界模；逆参与率分析表明零模对无序具有一定稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 该系数方法为构建高缠绕数非厄米拓扑超导体的拓扑相图提供了系统高效的途径，并揭示了趋肤效应与马约拉纳零模保护机制之间的微妙关系。

title: Flow-based generative models for amortized Bayesian inference in regression and inverse PDE problems
summary: Bayesian inference provides a principled framework for uncertainty quantification in scientific machine learning. However, conventional Bayesian approaches usually require solving a new inference problem for each observation set, causing substantial computational costs that hinder real-time applications like online monitoring and digital twins. Furthermore, inferring over infinite-dimensional function spaces with varying observation sets poses major challenges for existing amortized inference methods. In this work, we propose Flow-ABI, a flow-based generative framework for amortized Bayesian inference in regression and inverse partial differential equation (PDE) problems. It consists of two components: (i) a functional prior model that learns expressive priors from historical data and physical knowledge through flow matching, and (ii) a set-conditioned functional posterior sampler mapping observation sets to functional posterior distributions. The learned posterior model naturally accommodates varying, permutation-invariant observation sets, and generalizes across different observation discretizations. Once trained, Flow-ABI enables near-real-time posterior sampling for previously unseen observations without retraining or iterative optimization. The proposed methodology can be seamlessly integrated with a wide class of scientific machine learning frameworks, including physics-informed neural networks and neural operators, for uncertainty-aware inverse PDE modeling. Experiments demonstrate that Flow-ABI accurately captures both Gaussian and non-Gaussian posterior distributions while achieving over two-order-of-magnitude speedups relative to the gold-standard Bayesian inference method, Hamiltonian Monte Carlo. These results show Flow-ABI is an effective, scalable, and computationally efficient framework for uncertainty quantification in scientific machine learning.

AI.tldr: 提出Flow-ABI，一种基于流的生成式框架，用于回归和逆PDE问题中的摊销贝叶斯推理，实现近实时后验采样，速度比HMC快两个数量级。
AI.motivation: 传统贝叶斯方法每次观测都需要重新求解推理问题，计算成本高，难以满足在线监控和数字孪生等实时应用需求；同时现有摊销推理方法难以处理无限维函数空间和可变观测集。
AI.method: Flow-ABI包含两个组件：(i) 流匹配学习的函数先验模型，从历史数据和物理知识中学习表达性先验；(ii) 集条件函数后验采样器，将观测映射为函数后验分布，支持置换不变性和不同观测离散化。
AI.result: 准确捕获高斯和非高斯后验分布，相比黄金标准HMC实现超过两个数量级的加速。
AI.conclusion: Flow-ABI是一个有效、可扩展且计算高效的UQ框架，可与PINNs和神经算子等科学机器学习框架无缝集成。

title: Distribution of Majorana modes in the extended-range Kitaev chain
summary: The topological properties of the Kitaev chain model with extended-range interactions are investigated, focusing on cases where the topological winding number is preserved. We assume that the pairing and hopping terms decay algebraically in space with exponents $α$ and $β$, respectively. We show that in the truncated-range scenario, there are as many distinct topological phases as the number of coupled neighboring sites. In addition, an explicit analytical formulation is provided to evaluate the topological invariant and the phase transitions that emerge in these systems. Besides the analytical description, we introduce a new physical insight into the topological excitations of the ground-state by measuring the spatial distribution of the edge modes with the Majorana average position. Taking the next-nearest neighbor Kitaev chains as a probe, various numerical calculations of Majorana edge states were performed in finite-size clusters to determine the sensitivity of the topological zero energy modes to the parameters of interest. The occupation of edge-to-edge non-local fermion states is computed and defined as an effective parity. Such an effective parity exhibits new interesting features beyond the energetic exchange from the ground-state fermion parity switches, which are related to the distribution of the respective edge modes. Our calculations show a direct correlation between the ground-state fermion parity and the edge occupation numbers, which are translated into localization and delocalization of the Majorana average position.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了具有扩展相互作用的Kitaev链模型的拓扑性质，重点分析了拓扑缠绕数得以保留的情况。通过假设配对项和跳跃项在空间中代数十衰减，揭示了截断范围场景下拓扑相的数量与耦合近邻位点数一致，并给出了拓扑不变量和相变的解析表达式。提出了用Majorana平均位置测量边模空间分布的新物理视角，并在有限尺寸簇上对次近邻Kitaev链进行了数值计算。研究发现边缘占据数与基态费米子宇称直接相关，可转化为Majorana平均位置的局域化与退局域化。
AI.motivation: 探究扩展相互作用Kitaev链模型中拓扑性质的变化规律，特别是在拓扑缠绕数保留的情况下，建立拓扑不变量和相变的解析框架，并提供新的物理视角来理解拓扑激发。
AI.method: 采用代数十衰减的配对和跳跃项假设，通过解析推导计算拓扑缠绕数和不变量，并引入Majorana平均位置测量边模空间分布；在有限尺寸簇上对次近邻Kitaev链进行数值计算，分析有效宇称与边缘占据数的关系。
AI.result: 截断范围场景下拓扑相的数量等于耦合近邻位点数；基态费米子宇称与边缘占据数之间存在直接相关性，可转化为Majorana平均位置的局域化与退局域化；有效宇称表现出超越基态宇称开关的新特性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理解扩展相互作用Kitaev链的拓扑相提供了完整的解析和数值框架，Majorana平均位置作为新工具可有效表征拓扑边缘态的空间分布特性，边缘占据数与基态宇称的关联为拓扑量子计算中的边模操控提供了新见解。

title: Dominant in-plane anomalous Hall effect in a monoclinic room-temperature ferromagnet
summary: Ferromagnetic metals are characterized by enhanced dissipationless transverse transport responses via the anomalous Hall effect, offering a route towards magnetic sensing and spintronic readout functionalities. In most ferromagnets, the anomalous Hall current is constrained to lie in the plane perpendicular to the magnetization (or applied magnetic field). Recently, it has been recognized that selected symmetries can also permit a Hall response in a traditionally forbidden configuration, where the Hall current lies in the same plane as the magnetization, realizing an in-plane anomalous Hall effect. Reported realizations of this effect, however, are typically much weaker than the conventional Hall response in the same material. Here, through engineering specific crystallographic mirror symmetry-breaking, we realize a strongly enhanced in-plane anomalous Hall response in monoclinic Cr3Te4 with room-temperature ferromagnetism. Remarkably, the in-plane anomalous Hall signal exceeds the out-of-plane response by a factor of five, with which we demonstrate a unique in-plane field and current sensing functionality. Combined with density functional theory calculations, our results establish low-crystalline-symmetry ferromagnets with near-Fermi-level Weyl points as a practical platform for symmetry-engineered Hall responses, and point to a route towards room-temperature, geometry-flexible sensing devices.

AI.tldr: 本文通过在单斜Cr₃Te₄中工程化晶体对称性破缺，实现了室温下增强的面内反常霍尔效应，其信号强度是传统面外响应的五倍，并展示了独特的面内场和电流传感功能。
AI.motivation: 传统反常霍尔电流被限制在垂直于磁化方向的平面内，虽然已有研究在某些对称性下实现了面内反常霍尔效应，但信号通常很弱。本文旨在通过对称性工程大幅增强面内反常霍尔响应，实现实用的传感功能。
AI.method: 通过工程化特定晶体学镜面对称性破缺，在单斜Cr₃Te₄中实现强面内反常霍尔响应；结合密度泛函理论计算进行分析。
AI.result: 室温下，面内反常霍尔信号是传统面外响应的五倍；展示了独特的面内磁场和电流传感功能；DFT计算揭示了近费米能级Weyl点的作用。
AI.conclusion: 低晶格对称性铁磁体结合近费米能级Weyl点是一种实用的对称性工程化霍尔响应平台，为实现室温、几何灵活的传感设备指明了方向。

title: Minimization of disorder as a key design principle for natural sizes of light harvesting 2 complexes
summary: The light harvesting 2 (LH2) complex of purple bacteria has excellent energy conversion efficiency. Clarifying the design principle behind such efficiency at the atomistic level is crucial for understanding its structure-function relationship, and can be utilized for the design of artificial light harvesting systems. To this end, we conducted comprehensive computational investigation of the dynamical and statistical nature of electronic excited states of pigment molecules in a natural LH2 complex with 9-fold symmetry and its two non-natural {\it in silico} analogues with 6- and 12-fold symmetries. To ensure reliable and efficient all-atomistic molecular dynamics simulations, we combined a well established interpolation approach for the construction of the potential energy surface with a neural network machine learning approach. Outcomes of these calculations clarify that non-natural forms of LH2-type complexes have significantly larger quasistatic disorder than those for the natural one. In addition, non-natural systems have more disruptions of the hydrogen bonding, underscoring its crucial role for reducing the disorder. On the other hand, local environmental dynamics are relatively insensitive to the structural changes although there is moderate enhancement in the anharmonic or interatomic components for the synthetic ones. These findings based on all-atomistic simulations provide direct computational evidence that the structure and sizes of natural LH2 complexes are designed to minimize the energetic disorder. We analyze quantitative implications of these for the energy transferring capability of the LH2 complex.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过结合插值方法和神经网络机器学习，对天然9重对称的LH2复合物及其6重和12重对称的非天然类似物进行了全原子分子动力学模拟，发现天然LH2的结构和对称性能够最小化能量无序，而氢键网络在降低无序中起关键作用。
AI.motivation: 紫色细菌LH2复合物具有极高的能量转换效率，从原子层面阐明其设计原理对于理解结构-功能关系以及设计人工光捕获系统至关重要。
AI.method: 采用插值方法构建势能面，结合神经网络机器学习，对天然9重对称LH2及其6重和12重对称的非天然类似物进行全原子分子动力学模拟，分析激发态的动力学和统计特性。
AI.result: 非天然LH2类似物表现出显著更大的准静态无序，且氢键网络受到更多破坏；局部环境动力学对结构变化相对不敏感，但非天然系统中非谐波或原子间组分有适度增强。
AI.conclusion: 天然LH2复合物的结构和尺寸被设计为最小化能量无序，这为其高效能量传递能力提供了直接计算证据。

title: Antiferromagnetic order and magnetic polarons in lightly doped Li$_x$CoO$_2$ (x $\sim$ 0.9)
summary: We investigate the magnetic properties of Li$_x$CoO$_2$ (x$\sim$0.9) using bulk magnetization, specific heat, nuclear magnetic resonance (NMR) and electron paramagnetic resonance (EPR) spectroscopy measurements. The dc magnetization, specific heat and NMR measurements, which probe the macroscopic response, indeed show that this compound partially undergoes an antiferromagnetic transition below $T_N \sim$ 10 K. In addition, we observed a weak ferromagnetic response, which gives rise to the history dependence in magnetization measurements at low fields and is observed at temperatures above room temperature. We propose that there are ferromagnetic clusters at high temperatures due to the formation of magnetic polarons out of doped holes. In EPR measurements performed at the $X$-band frequency, only a fraction of the total spins contribute and show Curie-like paramagnetic behavior as reflected in the temperature dependence of the EPR intensity. The temperature variation of the EPR spectra can be understood in the framework of the diffusion of magnetic polarons.

AI.tldr: 本文通过多种磁学测量手段研究了LiₓCoO₂（x≈0.9）的磁性，发现其在~10K以下发生部分反铁磁转变，同时存在高温铁磁团簇（源于磁性极化子）和EPR观测到的类居里顺磁行为。
AI.motivation: 探究LiₓCoO₂（x≈0.9）的磁性性质，特别是其低温反铁磁转变和高温铁磁响应背后的微观机制。
AI.method: 综合运用块体磁化率、比热、核磁共振（NMR）和电子顺磁共振（EPR）谱学测量手段。
AI.result: 1）DC磁化率、比热和NMR显示该化合物在TN~10K以下发生部分反铁磁转变；2）观测到弱铁磁响应导致低场磁化历史依赖性，且该响应在室温以上仍存在；3）EPR中仅部分自旋贡献信号，表现出类居里顺磁行为。
AI.conclusion: 提出高温下掺杂空穴形成磁性极化子，进而形成铁磁团簇；EPR谱的温度变化可通过磁性极化子的扩散机制理解。

title: The Two Dimensional Dynamical Bulk Boundary Correspondence: Beyond Two Band Models
summary: A dynamical equivalent of the bulk-boundary correspondence has been suggested to occur in one and two dimensional topological models following sudden quenches. Depending on the topological invariant of the time evolving and initial phases involved large boundary contributions to a dynamical free energy occur. Moreover they occur periodically between the critical times at which this dynamical free energy becomes non-analytic, \emph{i.e.}~at dynamical quantum phase transitions. At these critical times the eigenvalue spectrum of the Loschmidt matrix which underlies the dynamical free energy closes its gap. The boundary contributions are understood to be due to zero-modes or in-gap bands of this matrix, forming a close analogy with equilibrium topological models and their edge modes. The exact cause of this phenomena and its generality remain unknown. In this article we test the dynamical bulk-boundary correspondence for a complicated two dimensional topological superconductor with a rich phase diagram, allowing quenches between many different Chern numbers. We show that there is no straightforward correspondence between the equilibrium phases quenched between and the dynamical bulk boundary correspondence. Furthermore the correspondence can depend on the orientation of the edges, suggesting a possible weak topological variant.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了二维拓扑超导体中动力学体-边界对应关系的有效性，发现该对应关系并不简单依赖于淬火前后平衡相的拓扑不变量，且与边界取向有关，可能存在弱拓扑变体。
AI.motivation: 动力学体-边界对应现象在一维和二维拓扑模型的突然淬火后被提出，但其确切成因和普适性仍未知，本文旨在测试该对应关系在更复杂的二维拓扑超导体中的表现。
AI.method: 选取一个具有丰富相图的复杂二维拓扑超导体模型，在多种不同陈数之间进行淬火，系统检验动力学体-边界对应关系是否成立，并考察边界取向的影响。
AI.result: 淬火前后平衡相的拓扑不变量与动力学体-边界对应之间没有直接对应关系；该对应关系依赖于边界取向，暗示可能存在弱拓扑变体。
AI.conclusion: 动力学体-边界对应并非普遍适用于所有拓扑系统，其表现受边界取向等因素影响，需要更深入的理论理解。

title: Electrical Spectroscopy of Intervalley Relaxation in WSe$_2$ Transistors
summary: We show that the transconductance of multilayer WSe$_2$ field-effect transistors serves as a direct electrical spectrometer of the intervalley relaxation time $τ_{\rm iv}$, previously accessible only by ultrafast optical techniques. Extending an equilibrium valley-thermodynamics framework with a single relaxation equation for the $Γ$-valley carrier fraction $f_Γ(t)$, we predict three signatures: (i)~a Lorentzian transconductance $g_m(ω)=g_{m,0}+g_{m,v}^0/(1+iωτ_{\rm iv})$, whose imaginary part peaks at $ω_c=τ_{\rm iv}^{-1}$ with opposite signs for bilayer and trilayer; (ii)~a two-stage current transient after a gate step, exhibiting bilayer overshoot or trilayer undershoot; and (iii)~sweep-rate-proportional hysteresis whose gate-voltage profile and layer-number sign reversal distinguish valley from trap-induced dynamics. All three signatures provide quantitative electrical access to $τ_{\rm iv}$ with standard rf and dc instrumentation.

AI.tldr: 本文展示多层WSe₂场效应晶体管的跨导可作为谷间弛豫时间τᵢᵥ的直接电学光谱仪，此前该参数仅能通过超快光学技术测量。通过拓展平衡态谷热力学框架并引入Γ谷载流子占比f_Γ(t)的单弛豫方程，作者预测了三种特征信号，并通过标准射频和直流仪器实现对τᵢᵥ的定量电学测量。
AI.motivation: 谷间弛豫时间τᵢᵥ是理解谷电子学的关键参数，但此前仅能通过超快光学技术测量，缺乏便捷的电学表征手段。本文旨在建立一种纯电学方法，利用晶体管跨导直接提取τᵢᵥ。
AI.method: 在平衡态谷热力学框架基础上，引入Γ谷载流子占比f_Γ(t)的单弛豫方程，理论预测了三种电学特征信号：(i) 跨导的洛伦兹频率响应，其虚部在ω_c=τᵢᵥ⁻¹处出现峰值且双层与三层符号相反；(ii) 栅极阶跃后的两阶段电流瞬态，双层表现为过冲而三层为欠冲；(iii) 与扫描速率成正比的迟滞，其栅压分布和层数依赖的符号反转可区分谷效应与陷阱效应。
AI.result: 理论预测了三种可用于电学测量τᵢᵥ的特征信号：跨导的洛伦兹型频率响应（虚部峰值频率对应τᵢᵥ⁻¹）、两阶段电流瞬态行为（双层过冲/三层欠冲）、以及扫描速率依赖的迟滞（可通过层数符号反转区分陷阱效应）。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了通过标准射频和直流仪器即可定量测量谷间弛豫时间τᵢᵥ，为谷电子学提供了全新的电学表征手段，避免了超快光学技术的复杂性。

title: An adaptive framework for the axisymmetric pulsar magnetosphere using physics-informed Kolmogorov-Arnold networks
comment: 25 pages, 10 figures. Submitted to Journal of Computational Physics
summary: The pulsar magnetosphere has only recently been addressed using Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs), by deploying a domain-decomposition approach and treating the separatrix and equatorial current sheet as infinitesimally thin discontinuities. However, this baseline requires extensive manual hyperparameter tuning, achieves limited final accuracy and demands several hours of training. We refine this framework by introducing domain-specific neural architectures based on Kolmogorov-Arnold networks, an automated adaptive training pipeline and a physics-based convergence criterion that eliminate the need for manual calibration. The proposed methodology delivers self-consistent axisymmetric magnetosphere solutions with mean squared errors of the PDE residuals at O(1e-6) in double precision - an improvement of two orders of magnitude over the baseline - while achieving convergence in under 20 minutes in single precision. Importantly, the method reliably resolves stellar radii reduced by up to 80% compared to the baseline, overcoming the severe spatial scale disparities that also challenge traditional solvers. Furthermore, by varying the flux that opens to infinity, we provide a correction to the equation that connects it to the equatorial T-point's position. The complete framework is released as the open-source library PulsarX.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Kolmogorov-Arnold网络的脉冲星磁球体求解框架PulsarX，通过自适应训练和物理收敛准则，将PDE残差均方误差提升至O(1e-6)，训练时间从数小时缩短至20分钟内，并修正了开放磁通与T点位置的关系方程。
AI.motivation: 现有基于PINN的脉冲星磁球体求解方法存在三个主要问题：需要大量手动超参数调优、最终精度有限、训练需要数小时。这些问题严重制约了该方法在实际研究中的应用。
AI.method: 1) 引入基于Kolmogorov-Arnold网络的领域特定神经架构；2) 设计自动化自适应训练流程；3) 建立基于物理的收敛准则，消除手动校准需求；4) 通过改变开放磁通量，修正了T点位置与开放磁通的关系方程。
AI.result: 1) PDE残差均方误差达到O(1e-6)，比基线方法提升两个数量级；2) 单精度下20分钟内收敛；3) 可将恒星半径可靠地缩减80%，克服了传统求解器面临的尺度差异问题；4) 修正了开放磁通与赤道T点位置的关系方程。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的PulsarX框架在精度、速度和鲁棒性上均显著超越现有基线，为脉冲星磁球体模拟提供了高效且开源的工具。

title: Microscopic Investigation of the Superconducting State in CuCo$_{2}$S$_{4}$: Evidence for an Intermediate-Coupling Fully Gapped Superconductor
summary: The thiospinel compound CuCo$_2$S$_4$ provides an attractive platform for exploring superconductivity in transition-metal chalcogenide spinels. Here, we report the first microscopic investigation of the superconducting state in CuCo$_2$S$_4$ using muon spin rotation and relaxation ($μ$SR) measurements, complemented by magnetization and heat-capacity experiments. The temperature dependence of the superconducting depolarization rate obtained from transverse-field $μ$SR measurements indicates a fully gapped superconducting order parameter. The extracted gap ratio $2Δ(0)/(k_{\mathrm{B}}T_\mathrm{SC}) = 3.95(2)$ exceeds the BCS weak-coupling value of 3.53, placing CuCo$_2$S$_4$ in the intermediate electron-phonon coupling regime. Zero-field $μ$SR measurements were performed to probe possible time-reversal symmetry breaking (TRSB) in the superconducting state. Within the experimental resolution, no additional spontaneous internal magnetic fields are observed below $T_c$. However, due to the presence of a ferromagnetic impurity phase and the associated fast-relaxing signal component, the sensitivity of the present measurements to weak spontaneous fields is reduced. Consequently, while no evidence for TRSB is detected, its existence cannot be definitively ruled out. Overall, our combined thermodynamic and $μ$SR results demonstrate that CuCo$_2$S$_4$ exhibits a fully gapped superconducting state with intermediate coupling strength, consistent with conventional $s$-wave superconductivity in this cobalt-based thiospinel system.

AI.tldr: 本文通过μSR、磁化率和热容测量，首次对CuCo₂S₄的超导态进行微观研究，发现其为完全能隙的超导体，能隙比2Δ(0)/(k_BT_SC)=3.95(2)超过BCS弱耦合值，处于中等电子-声子耦合区间。零场μSR未观察到时间反演对称性破缺，但因铁磁杂质相存在，无法完全排除其可能性。整体结果支持常规s波超导。
AI.motivation: 硫尖晶石化合物CuCo₂S₄为探索过渡金属硫族化物尖晶石中的超导性提供了一个有吸引力的平台，但目前缺乏对其超导态的微观研究。
AI.method: 使用μSR（横向场和零场）、磁化率和热容实验进行综合测量。
AI.result: 横向场μSR显示完全能隙超导序参量，能隙比3.95(2)超出BCS弱耦合值，处于中等耦合区间。零场μSR未发现自发内磁场证据，但因铁磁杂质影响，无法完全排除TRSB。
AI.conclusion: CuCo₂S₄呈现完全能隙超导态，具有中等耦合强度，与常规s波超导一致。

title: Predicting Defect States: A Quick Screening Protocol for Substitutional Point Defect Engineering
summary: Point defects in crystalline materials play a central role in determining electronic, optical, and magnetic properties. However, systematic exploration of defect configurations remains computationally expensive because large supercell calculations are required to approximate isolated defects under periodic boundary conditions. We present a unit-cell-based tight-binding protocol that enables rapid pre-screening of substitutional defects. The protocol extracts Wannier tight-binding Hamiltonians from small, fully relaxed unit cells of the host and defect-like systems, replicates the host Hamiltonian to construct a supercell model, and introduces the defect by modifying only the on-site energies at the substitution site while leaving the hopping parameters unchanged. We validate the protocol across three diverse systems: isostructural substitutional defects in transition-metal dichalcogenides (M$_\mathrm{Mo}$ MoS$_2$, M = Ce, Zr, Nb, Tc, and Ru), symmetry-breaking carbon substitutions in hexagonal boron nitride (C$_\mathrm{B}$C$_\mathrm{N}$ h-BN), and nitrogen-vacancy (NV$^-$) centers in diamond. These case studies span two-dimensional and three-dimensional hosts, simple substitutions, and substitution-vacancy complexes. In all cases, the protocol successfully captures the number of in-gap states, their degeneracies, and their shallow or deep character relative to host band edges, despite some quantitative deviations in absolute energy positions. We further identify limitations for vacancies of highly electronegative atoms and for charge-state or spin-polarization effects, both of which involve self-consistent charge redistribution not captured by the protocol.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于单位晶格的紧束缚协议，通过Wannier紧束缚哈密顿量快速预筛选替代缺陷，在三种不同体系中验证了其捕捉能隙态数量和特性的能力，但无法处理自洽电荷重分布效应。
AI.motivation: 晶体材料中的点缺陷对电子、光学和磁性性质至关重要，但传统超胞计算方法计算成本高昂，亟需一种更高效的预筛选方法。
AI.method: 从小型完全弛豫的单位晶格中提取Wannier紧束缚哈密顿量，复制宿主哈密顿量构建超胞模型，仅通过修改替代位点的在位能引入缺陷，保持跳跃参数不变。
AI.result: 在过渡金属硫族化合物、六方氮化硼中的碳替代以及金刚石中的氮-空位中心三种体系中，协议成功捕捉了能隙态的数量、简并度以及浅/深能级特性，尽管绝对能量位置存在定量偏差。
AI.conclusion: 该协议可作为缺陷配置的高效预筛选工具，但对高电负性原子空位、电荷态和自旋极化效应存在局限性，需要进一步改进以处理自洽电荷重新分布。

title: Fe3O4 Nano-octahedra/Vulcan XC72: Optimization and Combination with Solar-Based Electro-Fenton for Progestins Degradation
summary: The widespread presence of synthetic progestins, such as levonorgestrel (LNG) and gestodene (GES), in aquatic environments poses significant ecotoxicological risks due to their endocrine-disrupting properties. In this study, nano-octahedral magnetite (Fe3O4-NO) was synthesized via a hydrothermal route and incorporated into gas diffusion electrodes (GDEs) supported on Vulcan XC72 to enhance the in-situ electrogeneration of hydrogen peroxide (H2O2). High-resolution transmission electron microscopy, X-ray diffraction, SEM, X-ray photoelectron spectroscopy, and contact angle measurements thoroughly characterized the physicochemical and morphological properties of the materials. The 3% Fe3O4-NO/C catalyst provided a two-fold increase in H2O2 selectivity compared with Vulcan XC72. Electrochemical performance was optimized using a 2^3 factorial design and principal component analysis (PCA), with current density, pH, and Na2SO4 concentration as variables. The optimized GDE (3% Fe3O4-NO/C) achieved a maximum H2O2 production of 0.44 +/- 0.02 g L-1 with a current efficiency of 43.1 +/- 0.23% and a specific energy consumption of 0.012 +/- 0.009 kWh g-1. The electrode was further applied to the degradation of LNG and GES using solar and anodic-assisted electro-Fenton processes. Under optimal conditions, over 70% removal of both progestins was achieved, with stable performance across three operational cycles. These findings demonstrate the potential of 3% Fe3O4-NO/C-GDEs as efficient, reusable cathodes for sustainable electrochemical advanced oxidation processes (EAOPs) in water treatment.

AI.tldr: 本研究合成纳米八面体磁铁矿（Fe₃O₄-NO）并掺杂到气体扩散电极中，用于增强电化学产生H₂O₂，并应用于太阳光辅助电Fenton工艺降解左炔诺孕酮（LNG）和孕二烯酮（GES）两种合成孕激素，在优化条件下实现了>70%的去除率和稳定的循环性能。
AI.motivation: 合成孕激素（如LNG和GES）在水环境中广泛存在，因其内分泌干扰特性带来显著生态毒理学风险，亟需开发高效、可持续的水处理技术。
AI.method: 通过水热法合成纳米八面体Fe₃O₄-NO，负载于Vulcan XC72构建气体扩散电极；采用2³因子设计和主成分分析优化电流密度、pH和Na₂SO₄浓度；应用于太阳光和阳极辅助电Fenton过程降解LNG和GES。
AI.result: 3% Fe₃O₄-NO/C催化剂使H₂O₂选择性提高两倍；最优条件下H₂O₂产率0.44±0.02 g L⁻¹，电流效率43.1±0.23%，能耗0.012±0.009 kWh g⁻¹；两种孕激素去除率>70%，三循环性能稳定。
AI.conclusion: 3% Fe₃O₄-NO/C-GDE作为高效、可重复使用的阴极，在可持续电化学高级氧化工艺水处理中具有良好应用潜力。

title: Supermoiré Chern mosaic in helical trilayer WSe2
comment: 30 pages, including 4 main figures and 10 supplemental figures
summary: Helically twisted multilayers offer access to moiré physics beyond the single-superlattice paradigm, yet their correlated and topological transport properties remain largely unexplored in semiconductor moiré materials. Here we report magnetotransport measurements of helical trilayer WSe2, in which two coupled moiré patterns relax into a supermoiré landscape composed of inequivalent local topological domains with distinct electronic structures and unequal spatial areas. By electrostatic tuning, we identify a trilayer-hybridized regime where interactions and real-space reconstruction combine to generate a plethora of magnetic and topological states absent in the twisted bilayers. At moiré filling factor $ν$ = -1, we observe a ferromagnetic insulating state that is robust against magnetic field and accompanied by a non-quantized anomalous Hall response ~-4 kOhms. This behaviour is consistent with a time-reversal-symmetry-breaking supermoiré Chern mosaic, in which the Hall response arises from the non-cancelling contributions of local domains with opposite Chern character arranged by the relaxed structure. Under strong magnetic fields, a symmetry-broken Chern insulating state (C = 1) emerges near $ν$ = -2/3, displaying a much larger positive Hall response together with strongly enhanced longitudinal resistance, suggestive of field-reconstructed topological minibands and domain-boundary scattering. These results establish relaxed supermoiré semiconductor trilayers as a platform for spatially organized magnetism and topology beyond the bilayer limit.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了螺旋三层WSe₂的磁输运测量，发现其超摩尔纹结构中存在拓扑畴，并通过静电调控观察到铁磁绝缘态、反常霍尔效应和Chern绝缘态等丰富的磁性与拓扑态，建立了超摩尔纹半导体三层结构作为超越双层极限的平台。
AI.motivation: 螺旋堆叠的多层结构提供了超越单超晶格范式的摩尔纹物理，但半导体摩尔纹材料中关联和拓扑输运性质尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 对螺旋三层WSe₂进行磁输运测量，通过静电调控实现三层杂化态，研究其在不同摩尔纹填充因子下的输运行为。
AI.result: 在ν=-1处观察到鲁棒的铁磁绝缘态及非量子化的反常霍尔响应(~-4 kΩ)；在强磁场下ν=-2/3处出现对称性破缺的Chern绝缘态(C=1)，伴随大幅增强的霍尔响应和纵向电阻。
AI.conclusion: 研究了螺旋三层堆叠的WSe₂中的两个耦合摩尔纹图案形成的超摩尔纹，通过静电调控发现了一系列双层结构中不存在的磁性和拓扑态，铁磁绝缘态的反常霍尔响应可以被超摩尔纹Chern马赛克解释，不同区域拓扑性质的差异由松弛结构自发形成。

title: Dynamical Partition Functions of Stochastic Dynamics via Variational Flows
summary: Nonequilibrium thermodynamics is governed by the dynamical partition function, and its computation in high-dimensional continuous-state dynamics is a longstanding challenge. The Feynman-Kac formalism provides a rigorous representation for generating functions of arbitrary path observables; however, practical evaluation beyond low dimensions or the weak-noise limit is hindered by the curse of dimensionality and the exponentially growing replica demands of trajectory-based methods. Here we develop a mesh-free neural variational framework that realizes the Feynman-Kac theorem with generative flow models, recasting tilted stochastic evolution as a time-dependent optimization problem. This approach enables the direct computation of both finite-time and asymptotic trajectory thermodynamics in a unified manner. The method applies to general observables, enabling the evaluation of work, entropy production, and current fluctuations. We demonstrate the accuracy and scalability of this method in various nonequilibrium systems including high-dimensional cases.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经变分框架和生成流模型的方法，用于高效计算高维连续状态非平衡系统的动力学配分函数和轨迹热力学量，克服了维数灾难和传统方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 非平衡热力学中的动力学配分函数计算在高维连续状态系统中长期面临挑战，传统方法受限于维数灾难和轨迹方法指数级增长的副本需求。
AI.method: 开发了一种无网格神经变分框架，利用生成流模型实现Feynman-Kac定理，将倾斜随机演化转化为时间依赖的优化问题。
AI.result: 该方法可以统一计算有限时间和渐近轨迹热力学量，适用于一般可观测量（功、熵产生、电流涨落），并在高维非平衡系统中展示了准确性和可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的神经变分方法有效解决了高维非平衡热力学计算难题，具有较好的通用性和可扩展性。

title: Strain-programmable exciton diffusion in moiré heterostructures
summary: Moiré superlattices in van der Waals heterostructures have recently gained significant attention as an intriguing platform for studying correlated electronic systems and exotic excitonic properties. Previous reports, however, focused on creating and modulating moiré heterostructures through interlayer twisting or lattice constant mismatches, limiting controls on symmetry of heterostructures. In this work, we show that strain significantly alters the geometry of moiré superlattices by breaking the C3 rotational symmetry. We realize strain-induced moiré superlattices by intentionally regulating interlayer strain in WSe2-MoSe2 heterostructures, which is manifested by linearly polarized interlayer exciton emission coupled to the strain direction. Furthermore, interlayer exciton diffusion was preferentially guided along the stretched moiré superlattice orientations over a wide spatial range, reflecting the strain-modified moiré potentials. Our work highlights strain tuning as a versatile tool for designing moiré superlattices and programming excitonic transport, which opens pathways for van der Waals logic and information processing devices.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了通过应变调控WSe2-MoSe2异质结中的莫尔超晶格，打破了C3旋转对称性，实现了线性偏振的层间激子发射和定向激子扩散，为设计莫尔超晶格和编程激子传输提供了新方法。
AI.motivation: 以往研究主要通过层间扭转或晶格常数失配来构建和调控莫尔异质结，对异质结对称性的控制有限，需要探索新的调控手段。
AI.method: 在WSe2-MoSe2异质结中主动调控层间应变，利用应变打破C3旋转对称性来改变莫尔超晶格几何结构，并通过线性偏振层间激子发射和激子扩散实验验证应变效果。
AI.result: 应变成功改变了莫尔超晶格结构，产生了与应变方向耦合的线性偏振层间激子发射，并使层间激子沿拉伸的莫尔超晶格方向优先扩散。
AI.conclusion: 应变调控是设计莫尔超晶格和编程激子传输的多功能工具，为范德瓦尔斯逻辑与信息处理器件开辟了新途径。

title: Bounding the Null Space: Interval-Based Uncertainty Quantification for Non-Identifiable Groundwater Models
summary: Groundwater models are routinely non-identifiable: sparse subsurface observations leave many combinations of parameters, states, and boundary conditions equally consistent with the available data. Existing uncertainty quantification (UQ) methods address this by exploring a finite set of model realizations, but incomplete exploration can systematically underestimate the true range of admissible solutions. We propose a fundamentally different approach based on Optimization-based Bound Tightening (OBBT), which represents uncertainty directly as intervals and tightens them by extremizing variables over a constraint system encoding physical laws and observations. This yields guaranteed outer bounds on all uncertain variables without sampling, side-stepping the exploration problem entirely. To apply OBBT to groundwater flow, we discretize Darcy's law using a finite-volume scheme and handle the resulting bilinear terms through McCormick relaxations. We show that these relaxations can break the sign coupling between fluxes and head gradients, permitting non-physical rotational flow and failing to provide sufficient information for effective bound tightening. We identify flow sign prescription and irrotationality constraints as effective remedies and characterize their respective strengths and limitations. We demonstrate the framework on three numerical examples - a 1D steady-state model, a 2D steady-state model across four experimental configurations, and a 2D transient model on a hexagonal grid - and discuss computational performance, scalability, and directions for future research. OBBT offers a conservative, deterministic, and physically grounded alternative to ensemble-based UQ, with natural connections to null space theory and data assimilation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于优化边界收紧(OBBT)的替代方法用于地下水模型不确定性量化，通过区间表示和约束极值化直接获取保证的外边界，避免了传统采样方法探索不充分的问题，并通过数值实验验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有地下水模型不确定性量化方法依赖于有限模型实现集的探索，但探索不完整会系统性低估真实的解空间范围，需要一种能够提供保证性外边界的替代方案。
AI.method: 采用优化边界收紧(OBBT)方法，将不确定性表示为区间，通过对编码物理定律和观测数据的约束系统进行变量极值化来收紧边界。针对达西定律的有限体积离散化产生的双线性项，采用McCormick松弛处理，并提出流符号预设与无旋约束两种补救措施。
AI.result: 通过1D稳态、2D稳态（四种实验配置）及2D瞬态（六边形网格）三个数值示例进行验证，分析了计算性能和可扩展性，识别了McCormick松弛可能导致非物理旋转流的问题并给出了有效解决方案。
AI.conclusion: OBBT为基于集合的UQ提供了一种保守、确定性且物理基础坚实的替代方案，与零空间理论和数据同化有天然联系，但需注意松弛引入的非物理流动问题并通过约束加以修正。

title: Vortex pinning of Ba$_{0.62}$K$_{0.38}$BiO$_3$ investigated by magneto-optical Kerr-effect and magnetization measurements
summary: Vortex pinning plays a crucial role in determining properties of type-II superconductors. For example, it governs the irreversible magnetic response as well as dissipation caused by vortex motion. Here, we study vortex pinning in the three-dimensional oxide superconductor Ba1-xKxBiO3 using ultra-high-resolution magneto-optical Kerr effect (MOKE) and detailed magnetization measurements. We find that the zero-field MOKE signal in the superconducting state exhibits a pronounced magnetic-history dependence. This behavior closely resembles the remanent magnetization caused by trapped vortices. Furthermore, we demonstrate that the observed evolution of the MOKE signals is well described by Bean's critical-state model for trapped vortices. Our results establish MOKE as a viable optical and mesoscopic probe of vortex pinning in type-II superconductors, providing a new complementary approach to investigate mixed-state phenomena. We also find that the training-field dependence of the MOKE is linear near zero training field, without any anomalies indicative of spontaneous time-reversal-symmetry breaking in an unconventional superconducting state. Our study defines a clear protocol to distinguish vortex-induced MOKE responses from those associated with a time-reversal-symmetry broken superconducting order parameter.

AI.tldr: 本文利用超高分辨率磁光克尔效应（MOKE）和磁化测量，研究了三维氧化物超导体Ba1-xKxBiO3中的涡旋钉扎效应。发现零场MOKE信号表现出明显的磁历史依赖性，与俘获涡旋引起的剩余磁化行为一致，且被Bean临界态模型很好地描述。研究确立了MOKE作为探测II类超导体涡旋钉扎的光学介观探针，并排除了该体系中存在自发时间反演对称性破缺的可能性。
AI.motivation: 涡旋钉扎决定了II类超导体的不可逆磁响应和由涡旋运动引起的耗散，然而目前缺乏有效的光学介观探测手段来研究其行为。
AI.method: 采用超高分辨率磁光克尔效应（MOKE）结合详细的磁化测量，对Ba1-xKxBiO3单晶进行实验研究，并用Bean临界态模型分析数据。
AI.result: 零场MOKE信号呈现显著的磁历史依赖性，与俘获涡旋的剩余磁化行为一致；该演化被Bean临界态模型很好地描述；训练场依赖关系在零场附近呈线性，无时间反演对称性破缺的异常信号。
AI.conclusion: MOKE可作为探测II类超导体涡旋钉扎的有效光学介观探针，为研究混合态现象提供新方法；同时定义了区分涡旋诱发MOKE响应与时间反演对称性破缺超导序参量响应的清晰协议。

title: Synthesis and Characterization of Atomically-Sharp Superconductor-Dielectric Interface
summary: Modification of superconductor-dielectric interfaces is known to strongly impact coherence times of superconducting quantum devices. This relationship is thought to arise from differences in the concentration of "two-level system" defects in the disordered dielectrics and superconductor-dielectric interfaces; these defects couple to electromagnetic modes in the device and cause dissipation. Zirconium oxide barrier layers on niobium have emerged as a promising pathway to low-loss interfaces in recent years, evidently due to the crystalline nature of these layers in comparison to the amorphous niobium native oxide. We explain the unique ability of zirconium oxide to form a crystalline layer, to maintain a sharp interface with metallic niobium, and to prevent niobium oxide re-growth in terms of the chemical properties of ZrO$_2$ and the Nb-Zr-O ternary system. We demonstrate a new method to grow air-stable zirconium oxide layers on niobium with a higher level of crystallinity and a sharper oxide-metal interface than previously shown, and provide the first comprehensive microscopic analysis of ZrO$_2$ capping layer properties. These developments pave the way toward vital performance advances in superconducting quantum devices.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了ZrO₂覆盖层在铌基超导量子器件中的应用，解释了其形成晶体界面、抑制氧化层再生长的化学机制，并展示了比以往更优的晶态ZrO₂制备方法及微观分析，为提升量子器件性能铺平道路。
AI.motivation: 超导量子器件的相干时间受超导体-介电界面处“二能级系统”缺陷的影响，而ZrO₂阻挡层有望降低界面损耗，但其化学机制与制备优化尚需深入研究。
AI.method: 基于Nb-Zr-O三元体系的化学性质分析，解释ZrO₂形成晶态、保持锐利界面并阻止铌氧化物再生的能力；开发了一种新的空气稳定的ZrO₂层生长方法，并进行了全面的微观分析。
AI.result: 实现了比以往更高结晶度、更锐利氧化物-金属界面的ZrO₂覆盖层，并首次提供了全面的微观分析结果。
AI.conclusion: ZrO₂覆盖层在制备低损耗超导量子接口方面具有独特优势，该工作为超导量子器件的性能提升奠定了基础。

title: The UZH protocol: Separating errors and constructing improved CP2K basis sets and pseudopotentials
summary: Reliable density-functional simulations require numerical settings whose residual errors are smaller than the chemical and materials trends being interpreted. In CP2K/Quickstep, this requirement is complicated by the joint use of atom-centered Gaussian basis sets and norm-conserving pseudopotentials: a code-to-code discrepancy usually contains both contributions. We present the UZH protocol, a closed-loop CP2K workflow that calibrates molecularly optimized Gaussian basis sets on small molecules, validates the resulting settings in unary-crystal equation-of-state benchmarks, identifies whether the limiting approximation is the Gaussian basis or the pseudopotential. The diagnosis is then used to revise the parameter files. The central diagnostic is a three-way comparison between production CP2K-GTH-UZH calculations, SIRIUS calculations using the same Goedecker--Teter--Hutter pseudopotential in a systematic plane-wave representation, and all-electron full-potential linearized augmented-plane-wave SIRIUS references. This construction decomposes the practical CP2K error into a Gaussian-basis component and a pseudopotential component. The protocol distinguishes basis-limited noble-gas and heavy-element cases from pseudopotential-limited transition-metal cases, guides targeted revisions with the CP2K basis and pseudopotential optimizers, and produces improved MOLOPT basis sets and GTH pseudopotentials as explicit outputs of the workflow. The UZH protocol is therefore constructive: it does not merely measure or reduce errors a posteriori, but allows turning verification outliers into validated CP2K parameter files for simulations across molecules and condensed phases.

AI.tldr: 提出UZH协议，一个闭环CP2K工作流，通过比较Gaussian基组、平面波和全电子计算，分解并校准Gaussian基组和赝势的误差，生成改进的MOLOPT基组和GTH赝势参数文件。
AI.motivation: CP2K/Quickstep中联合使用原子中心Gaussian基组和模守恒赝势时，代码间差异同时包含基组和赝势两种贡献，难以单独诊断误差来源，需要一种系统化方法分解并校准这两种误差。
AI.method: 构建三路比较：CP2K-GTH-UZH计算 vs SIRIUS平面波计算（相同GTH赝势） vs 全电子全势线性化增广平面波SIRIUS参考。通过对比将CP2K误差分解为Gaussian基组分量和赝势分量，据此诊断误差来源并针对性优化参数文件。
AI.result: 成功区分基组受限案例（稀有气体、重金属）和赝势受限案例（过渡金属），并指导了CP2K基组和赝势优化器进行针对性修正，输出改进的MOLOPT基组和GTH赝势。
AI.conclusion: UZH协议不仅是后验的误差度量工具，更是建设性的工作流——将验证异常转化为经过验证的CP2K参数文件，适用于分子和凝聚相模拟。

title: Microscopic evidence for a Zhang-Rice triplet state in the van der Waals antiferromagnet, NiPS$_3$
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures; Accepted for publication in Physical Review Letters
summary: Quantum-entangled states underpin many emergent phenomena in quantum materials, yet their direct experimental identification remains a challenge. NiPS$_3$, a van der Waals antiferromagnet exhibiting a resolution-limited magnetic exciton in its ordered phase, has been proposed to host a many-body entangled Zhang-Rice triplet state. Here, using $^{33}$S nuclear magnetic resonance (NMR) on $^{33}$S-enriched NiPS$_3$ single crystals, we provide microscopic evidence for this charge-transfer state. The $^{33}$S and $^{31}$P Knight shifts as a function of temperature reveal a unified spin-triplet configuration arising from strong hybridization between a self-doped hole in the S $3p$ orbitals and a hole in Ni $3d$ orbitals. Furthermore, the $^{33}$S nuclear spin-lattice relaxation rate exhibits a power-law divergence as it approaches the Néel temperature $T_N=155$ K, indicating critical slowing down of collective charge fluctuations consistent with spin-nematic correlations. These results reveal a spin-charge-intertwined ground state and establish the microscopic foundation for the exceptional coherence of the magnetic exciton in NiPS$_3$.

AI.tldr: 本文通过³³S核磁共振实验，在NiPS₃中证实了Zhang-Rice三重态这一量子纠缠态的存在，并发现其自旋-电荷纠缠的基态特性。
AI.motivation: 量子纠缠态是量子材料中许多涌现现象的基础，但直接实验识别仍然困难。NiPS₃中观测到的磁性激子被认为可能源于多体纠缠的Zhang-Rice三重态，需要微观实验证据。
AI.method: 对³³S富集的NiPS₃单晶进行³³S核磁共振（NMR）测量，分析³³S和³¹P的Knight位移随温度的变化，以及³³S核自旋-晶格弛豫率的行为。
AI.result: Knight位移显示统一的自旋三重态构型，源于S 3p轨道自掺杂空穴与Ni 3d轨道空穴的强杂化；³³S核自旋-晶格弛豫率在接近Néel温度TN=155 K时呈现幂律发散行为，表明集体电荷涨落的临界慢化与自旋向列关联一致。
AI.conclusion: 这些结果揭示了自旋-电荷纠缠的基态，为NiPS₃中磁性激子的异常相干性建立了微观基础。

title: Continuous and discontinuous transitions in the Ising-Heisenberg model on the extended Lieb lattice in a magnetic field
comment: 22 pages, 8 figures, submission to SciPost Physics Core journal
summary: The spin-1/2 Ising-Heisenberg model on the extended Lieb lattice in a magnetic field is exactly mapped onto an effective spin-1/2 Ising model on the square lattice. The ground-state phase diagram comprises the quantum antiferromagnetic (QAF), quantum monomer-dimer (MD), classical ferrimagnetic (FRI), and classical ferromagnetic phase. The MD-FRI ground-state phase boundary extends to finite temperatures as a dome-shaped surface of discontinuous thermal transitions bounded by a line of Ising critical points. The QAF phase is enclosed by a surface of continuous thermal transitions evolving from the QAF-MD and QAF-FRI ground-state phase boundaries. Monte Carlo simulations fully confirm the existence and nature of both continuous and discontinuous thermal phase transitions obtained by exact and approximate analytical calculations.

AI.tldr: 本文通过精确映射和数值模拟研究了扩展Lieb格子上自旋1/2 Ising-Heisenberg模型在磁场中的相图，发现了量子反铁磁、单体-二聚体、经典亚铁磁和经典铁磁四种基态相，以及连续和不连续热相变行为。
AI.motivation: 研究者希望理解具有竞争相互作用的量子自旋系统在磁场中的基态和有限温相图，特别是探索量子与经典相之间的转变及其热力学性质。
AI.method: 将扩展Lieb格子上的自旋1/2 Ising-Heisenberg模型精确映射为正方格子上的有效自旋1/2 Ising模型，结合蒙特卡洛模拟和近似解析计算进行分析。
AI.result: 得到了包含QAF、MD、FRI和铁磁四种基态相的相图；MD-FRI相边界在有限温呈现穹顶状不连续热转变表面，被Ising临界点线所包围；QAF相被连续热转变表面所包围；蒙特卡洛模拟证实了连续和不连续热相变的存在与性质。
AI.conclusion: 该模型展现了丰富的基态和有限温相图，精确映射方法结合数值模拟能有效揭示量子自旋系统中的复杂相变行为。

title: Spin polarisation signatures of Fractionally Charged Skyrmions in Fractional Quantum Hall states
summary:
We investigate spin polarisation and low-energy excitations in fractional quantum Hall (FQH) states using cavity-polariton spectroscopy of high-mobility GaAs quantum wells. By measuring the optical coupling strength of interband Landau-level excitations over the range $1/3 \le ν\le 1$, we extract the spin polarisation of the electron system as a function of filling factor.
  Complete suppression of the oscillator strength of the lowest energy excitation, characteristic of singlet trion formation in fully polarised systems, is reported for the first time in this regime.
  At large magnetic fields, fully polarised FQH states exhibit symmetric depolarisation away from their quantised fillings, analogous to Skyrmionic behaviour near $ν=1$. The depolarisation follows an empirical law $S=ν^*$, where $S$ is the number of spin flips per added magnetic flux quantum and $ν^*$ the effective Composite Fermion filling factor. We interpret this behaviour as evidence for Minimal Fractionally Charged Skyrmions (MFCS) formed from bound spin-flip and quasiparticle excitations.

AI.tldr: 本文利用腔-极化子光谱技术研究高迁移率GaAs量子阱中的分数量子霍尔态，首次报道了该能区完全极化系统中最低能量激发的振荡器强度完全抑制现象（表征单重态三子形成），并发现完全极化FQH态在远离量子化填充时出现对称退极化行为，该行为遵循经验规律 $S=ν^*$，被解释为最小分数电荷斯格明子（MFCS）存在的证据。
AI.motivation: 探索分数量子霍尔（FQH）态中的自旋极化性质和低能激发机制，特别是完全极化系统中最低能量激发的振荡器强度完全抑制现象，以及极化态在远离量子化填充时的退极化行为。
AI.method: 采用腔-极化子光谱技术测量高迁移率GaAs量子阱中带间朗道能级激发的光学耦合强度，在填充因子 $1/3 \le ν\le 1$ 范围内提取电子系统的自旋极化度。
AI.result: 首次在该能区观察到完全极化系统中最低能量激发的振荡器强度完全抑制，表征单重态三子形成；完全极化FQH态在远离量子化填充时出现对称退极化，退极化遵循 $S=ν^*$ 经验规律。
AI.conclusion: 退极化行为与 $ν=1$ 附近的斯格明子行为类似，解释为最小分数电荷斯格明子（MFCS）存在的证据，MFCS由束缚的自旋翻转和准粒子激发形成。

title: Graphlet Histogram Representation Database of Inorganic Crystals
summary: Machine learning models for materials property prediction increasingly rely on representations learned end-to-end from large density-functional-theory databases, limiting their applicability when only scarce experimental data are available. Domain-knowledge-driven representations precomputed from crystal structures alone offer a data-efficient, interpretable alternative, but existing approaches capture at most composition or bonding connectivity and discard local structural geometry. Here, we present Graphlet-MP, a database of graphlet histogram representations for 149,082 inorganic crystals from the Materials Project (MP). Seventy-nine distributions describe each material over three hierarchical graphlet orders: atomic sites, bonded pairs, and bond-angle triplets, extracted via screened Voronoi tessellation from the crystallographic information file. We provide a complete technical specification of the representation, an Earth Mover's Distance metric for comparing materials in this space, and the full precomputed database. An accompanying open-source codebase enables users to generate graphlet histograms for arbitrary crystal structures, including experimentally determined ones, and to extend the database to new materials or target properties.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Graphlet-MP，一个基于图小波直方图的无机晶体结构表示数据库，涵盖149,082种材料，通过三种层次图结构（原子位点、键对、键角三元组）描述材料，提供Earth Mover's Distance度量、完整数据库及开源代码，为数据稀缺场景下基于领域知识的材料性质预测提供了高效、可解释的替代方案。
AI.motivation: 现有材料性质预测的机器学习模型大多依赖从大规模密度泛函理论(DFT)数据库中端到端学习的表示，在实验数据稀缺时适用性受限。而基于领域知识的表示虽然数据高效且可解释，但现有方法最多仅能捕捉组分或键连接性，忽略了局部结构几何信息。因此，需要一种既能充分利用领域知识、又能保留局部结构几何信息的表示方法。
AI.method: 本文通过筛选的Voronoi镶嵌方法，从晶体学信息文件(CIF)中提取三种层次的图小波(graphlet)描述：1) 原子位点(atomic sites)；2) 键对(bonded pairs)；3) 键角三元组(bond-angle triplets)。共计79种分布来描述每种材料，并构建了包含149,082种无机晶体的Graphlet-MP数据库。同时提供了Earth Mover's Distance作为比较度量，以及开源代码供用户扩展。
AI.result: 成功构建了包含149,082种无机晶体的Graphlet直方图表示数据库，提供了完整的技术规范、Earth Mover's Distance距离度量，以及预计算数据库。开源代码库支持用户为任意晶体结构生成图小波直方图，包括实验测定的结构，并可扩展至新材料或目标性质。
AI.conclusion: Graphlet-MP为材料性质预测提供了一种数据高效、可解释的替代方案，特别适用于实验数据稀缺的情况。通过保留局部结构几何信息，弥补了现有领域知识驱动表示方法的不足，有望推动材料科学中基于结构表示的下游预测任务。

title: Superheating field of clean superconductors near the type-I--type-II boundary: the low-temperature Meissner stability limit of niobium
summary: We calculate the low-temperature superheating field $B_{\rm sh}$ of clean superconductors near the boundary between type-I and type-II superconductivity, with particular emphasis on Nb. The calculation is based on the self-consistent nonlinear nonlocal Eilenberger theory and the linear stability analysis of the Meissner state. For a Nb-like material with $κ_{\rm GL}=0.7$, we obtain $B_{\rm sh}\simeq 290\,{\rm mT}$ at $T/T_c=0.2$, using $B_{c0}\simeq 200\,{\rm mT}$. This value is substantially higher than the value obtained by naively extrapolating the Ginzburg--Landau result near $T_c$ to $T\ll T_c$. For a TESLA-shaped Nb accelerator cavity, it corresponds to an intrinsic Meissner-stability limit of about $67\,{\rm MV/m}$.

AI.tldr: 本文利用自洽非线性非局域Eilenberger理论，计算了干净超导体在低温下的超热场$B_{\rm sh}$，重点关注Nb材料。在$κ_{\rm GL}=0.7$、$T/T_c=0.2$条件下，得到$B_{\rm sh}\simeq 290\,{\rm mT}$，显著高于从Ginzburg-Landau理论近$T_c$外推的结果。对TESLA型Nb加速腔，对应的内禀Meissner稳定性极限约为$67\,{\rm MV/m}$。
AI.motivation: 现有Ginzburg-Landau理论主要适用于近$T_c$区域，将其结果简单外推至低温区可能不准确，因此需要更精确的理论来计算低温下超导体的超热场，特别是针对Nb等实际应用材料。
AI.method: 采用自洽非线性非局域Eilenberger理论，结合Meissner态的线性稳定性分析进行计算。
AI.result: 对于$κ_{\rm GL}=0.7$的类Nb材料，在$T/T_c=0.2$时得到$B_{\rm sh}\simeq 290\,{\rm mT}$（使用$B_{c0}\simeq 200\,{\rm mT}$），该值显著高于从Ginzburg-Landau结果近$T_c$外推至低温的值。
AI.conclusion: 对于TESLA型Nb加速腔，该结果对应的内禀Meissner稳定性极限约为$67\,{\rm MV/m}$，表明超热场在低温下比先前预期更高。

title: Pressure-Driven Structural Phase Competition and Functional Response in Layered LiInP2S6
summary: Understanding how hydrostatic pressure modifies interlayer interactions and competing ionic configurations is essential for controlling the emergent functional properties of layered quantum materials. Here, using first-principles density-functional theory calculations, we investigate the pressure-dependent structural, mechanical, electronic, and optical properties of three competing LiInP2S6 polymorphs: the monoclinic C2/c phase and the trigonal P-31c phase in both in-layer and in-gap configurations. Our results reveal a pressure-induced structural phase transition from the monoclinic ground-state C2/c phase to a trigonal P-31c in-layer phase at ~0.38 GPa, driven by enhanced interlayer coupling and anisotropic lattice compression. In contrast, the trigonal P-31c in-gap phase remains energetically unfavorable due to its stronger interlayer ionic interactions and reduced compressibility. All phases remain mechanically stable under compression (0-26 GPa) and exhibit enhanced mechanical rigidity, elastic wave velocities, and Debye temperatures with increasing pressure. Remarkably, the electronic and optical properties within each phase remain highly robust under pressure, with only moderate changes in the band gap and optical absorption edge (UV-Visible range) under pressure; however, substantial modifications emerge across the pressure-induced structural phase transition. These findings establish LiInP2S6 as a pressure sensitive ionic-vdW material in which subtle changes in interlayer interactions govern structural stability and functional properties.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算，研究了LiInP2S6三种竞争相在压力下的结构、力学、电子和光学性质，发现单斜C2/c相在~0.38 GPa压力下转变为三方P-31c相（in-layer构型），而三方P-31c in-gap相因更强的层间离子相互作用而不稳定。各相在0-26 GPa内保持力学稳定，电子和光学性质在相变前后变化显著。
AI.motivation: 理解静水压力如何调控层状量子材料中层间相互作用和竞争离子构型，对于控制其涌现功能特性至关重要。
AI.method: 采用基于第一性原理密度泛函理论（DFT）计算，研究三种竞争性LiInP2S6多型体（单斜C2/c相、三方P-31c in-layer相和in-gap相）的压力依赖特性。
AI.result: 1. 发现C2/c相在~0.38 GPa发生压力诱导的结构相变，转变为三方P-31c in-layer相；2. P-31c in-gap相因更强的层间离子相互作用和更低的可压缩性始终不稳定；3. 所有相在0-26 GPa内力学稳定，且刚度、弹性波速和德拜温度随压力增加；4. 各相内电子和光学性质对压力不敏感，但相变时发生显著变化。
AI.conclusion: LiInP2S6是一种压力敏感的离子-范德华材料，层间相互作用的微妙变化主导其结构稳定性和功能特性。

title: Full-State and Reduced-Moment Encodings: A Representation-Level View of Equilibrium Quantum Many-Body Theory
summary: Equilibrium quantum many-body methods differ not only in approximation, but in which information they represent explicitly. We formulate this distinction by fixing an equilibrium specification and viewing every representation as an encoder from admissible states to represented variables. The identity encoder gives a full-state representation, whereas a non-injective encoder gives a reduced representation whose value labels a fiber of compatible states. For a specified task, an exact decoder exists on a state class if and only if the task is constant on the encoder fibers within that class. Variational principles, reconstruction correspondences, functionals, kernels, and closures are different realizations of additional structure used to select, restrict, or approximate the task-relevant content of a fiber when the retained variable alone is insufficient. Static moments and imaginary-time correlation functions are unified as restrictions of a complete equilibrium readout functional to different probe families. Within the same principle, quantum embedding can be viewed as consistency or replacement between global and local descriptions through reduced interface encoders and their conjugate fields.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了平衡量子多体方法的统一框架，将不同表示方法视为编码器，通过编码器纤维和任务相关性来统一理解变分原理、重构对应、泛函、核和闭包等概念，并统一了静态矩与虚时关联函数，将量子嵌入视为全局与局部描述之间的一致性关系。
AI.motivation: 平衡量子多体方法不仅在近似程度上不同，在显式表示哪些信息方面也存在差异。作者希望系统化这种区别，建立统一的形式化框架来理解不同表示方法之间的关系。
AI.method: 通过固定平衡规范，将每种表示视为从可接受状态到表示变量的编码器。恒等编码器给出全态表示，非单射编码器给出约化表示。利用编码器纤维（兼容状态的标签）来定义精确解码器的存在条件。将变分原理、重构对应、泛函、核和闭包等不同概念统一为用于选择、限制或近似纤维中任务相关内容的附加结构。
AI.result: 统一了静态矩与虚时关联函数作为完整平衡读出泛函在不同探针族上的限制；将量子嵌入解释为通过约化接口编码器及其共轭场在全局与局部描述之间的一致性替换关系。
AI.conclusion: 该框架提供了一种理解平衡量子多体方法的新视角，揭示了不同表示方法之间的深层联系，为方法比较和组合提供了理论基础。

title: SANS and magnetometry study of the magnetic phase diagram of the B20 helimagnet FeRhSi
summary: This manuscript reports the first direct neutron-scattering evidence for long-period helimagnetism in the newly identified 4d-substituted B20 compound Fe0.5Rh0.5Si. By combining SANS with low-field magnetometry, we establish the magnetic modulation, construct a field-temperature phase diagram, and identify a candidate A-phase region supported by an independent structural signature. The work is important beyond this single compound because it expands the family of chiral B20 helimagnets into Rh-substituted materials, where spin-orbit coupling, disorder, and Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya interactions can be tuned. It will interest researchers in chiral magnetism, topological spin textures, magnetic neutron scattering, and quantum materials, and provides a foundation for future studies of emergent magnetic phases and topology-driven phenomena in chemically tuned chiral magnets.

AI.tldr: 首次通过中子散射在4d元素替代的B20化合物Fe0.5Rh0.5Si中发现了长周期螺旋磁性，结合SANS和低场磁力测量构建了相图，并识别出A相区域，扩展了手性B20螺旋磁体家族。
AI.motivation: 探索4d元素替代（Rh）对B20手性螺旋磁体家族的影响，验证Fe0.5Rh0.5Si是否具有长周期螺旋磁性，并扩展可调谐的自旋轨道耦合、无序和Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用材料体系。
AI.method: 结合小角中子散射（SANS）和低场磁力测量，建立磁调制结构，构建场-温度相图，并通过独立的结构特征识别候选A相区域。
AI.result: 首次获得中子散射直接证据，证明Fe0.5Rh0.5Si中存在长周期螺旋磁性；成功构建了场-温度相图，并识别出一个具有独立结构特征的候选A相区域。
AI.conclusion: 该工作将手性B20螺旋磁体家族扩展至Rh替代材料体系，为后续化学调谐手性磁体中涌现磁相和拓扑驱动现象的研究奠定了基础。

title: Thermodynamic Approach to Momentum Transport in Dense Fluids
summary: We present a new framework for extending Chapman-Enskog theory beyond the hard-sphere fluid model. Rather than relying on effective hard sphere diameters, the approach makes use of on an exchange function which can be related to the thermodynamic properties of the system. We show that two existing extensions, including modified Enskog theory (MET), fit into this new framework. Based on our approach, we propose an alternative to MET that takes into account the potential interaction energy associated with the inter-particle interactions in the fluid. The proposed expression is applied to predicting the shear viscosity of several different simulated fluid models across a wide set of densities $0.05 \leq ρ^* \leq 0.8$ and temperatures $1.5 \leq T^* \leq 4.0$ in Lennard-Jones units. The fluid models considered include both the Weeks-Chandler-Anderson (WCA) fluid and the Lennard-Jones (LJ) fluid. At low and intermediate density, here taken to be $ρ^* \leq 0.3$, we report mean relative prediction errors between $2\%$ and $4\%$ for both these. Across all densities considered, the largest mean relative errors reported are $4.4\%$ and $8.1\%$ for the WCA fluid and LJ fluid respectively. We also investigate other interaction models, including a diatomic molecular model, in order to better understand the limitations of our approach.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的查普曼-恩斯科格理论扩展框架，通过交换函数替代硬球直径，适用于多种流体模型。在低中密度下对WCA和LJ流体的剪切粘度预测误差仅为2%-4%，整体最大误差分别为4.4%和8.1%。
AI.motivation: 传统查普曼-恩斯科格理论局限于硬球流体模型，现有扩展（如修正恩斯科格理论MET）依赖有效硬球直径，缺乏普适性。作者希望建立一个更通用的框架，不依赖硬球假设，能直接关联热力学性质，从而更准确地预测多种流体的输运性质。
AI.method: 引入一个与系统热力学性质相关的交换函数，替代传统的有效硬球直径。基于此框架，提出了一个新的替代MET的表达式，该表达式考虑了粒子间相互作用的势能。通过分子模拟数据，在Lennard-Jones单位下，对WCA流体、LJ流体以及双原子分子模型在宽密度(0.05-0.8)和温度(1.5-4.0)范围内进行剪切粘度预测验证。
AI.result: 低中密度(ρ*≤0.3)下，WCA和LJ流体的预测误差仅2%-4%。全密度范围内，WCA流体最大平均误差4.4%，LJ流体为8.1%。通过双原子分子模型进一步探究了方法的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 新框架成功将MET等现有扩展统一纳入，提出的替代方法在宽范围内具有良好预测精度，尤其在中低密度下表现优异。该方法为更复杂的流体系统提供了新的理论工具。

title: Interplay between Aharonov-Bohm and Altshuler-Aronov-Spivak oscillations in phase-pure GaAs/InAs core/shell nanowires of different lengths
comment: 11 pages, 5 figures, 12 pages supplemental material including 12
summary: In GaAs/InAs core/shell nanowires, comprising a tubular conducting shell, interference phenomena observed under an axial field and originating from closed-loop states encircling the insulating core, provide an ideal platform for superconducting quantum devices that utilize effects such as Aharonov--Bohm or Altshuler--Aronov--Spivak-type conductance oscillations. Both effects are different in nature with respect to phase rigidity because of interference of non-time-reversed or time-reversed paths, respectively. Since their occurrence is largely governed by averaging effects, which depend on sample dimensions and the transport regime, we present a systematic study of flux-periodic oscillations of phase-pure zinc-blende GaAs/InAs core/shell nanowires as a function of gate voltage for samples with different contact separation lengths. Our analysis shows that with increasing contact separation length, averaging effects result in gradual reduction of $h/e$-periodic Aharonov--Bohm-type oscillations, while the $h/2e$-periodic Altshuler--Aronov--Spivak oscillations and its $h/4e$-periodic higher harmonics are enhanced. The additional phase rigidity seen in the $h/3e$-periodic oscillations is attributed to phase rigidity propagating from the neighbouring lower harmonics. Our tight-binding transport simulations on nanowires of different lengths which contain only a few scattering centers confirm the experimental observations regarding the different harmonics and their phase rigidity. Together, our experimental and simulation findings indicate quasi-ballistic transport with persistent Aharonov--Bohm-, and phase-rigid Altshuler--Aronov--Spivak-type oscillations despite few scattering centers.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了GaAs/InAs核壳纳米线中不同接触间距下通量周期振荡现象的演变规律，发现随着接触间距增加，h/e周期的Aharonov-Bohm振荡减弱，而h/2e周期的Altshuler-Aronov-Spivak振荡及其高次谐波增强，并通过紧束缚输运模拟验证了实验结果。
AI.motivation: Aharonov-Bohm效应和Altshuler-Aronov-Spivak效应在相位刚性上本质不同，它们的发生受平均效应影响，而平均效应依赖于样品尺寸和输运机制。因此需要对不同接触间距的纳米线进行系统研究，以揭示这些振荡现象的演变规律。
AI.method: 对不同接触间距的相纯闪锌矿GaAs/InAs核壳纳米线，测量通量周期振荡随栅压的变化；同时进行紧束缚输运模拟，在仅含少量散射中心的纳米线上验证实验观测结果。
AI.result: 接触间距增大时，h/e周期的Aharonov-Bohm振荡逐渐减弱；h/2e周期的Altshuler-Aronov-Spivak振荡及其h/4e高次谐波增强；h/3e周期振荡的相位刚性源于邻近低次谐波的相位刚性传播。
AI.conclusion: 实验与模拟结果共同表明，尽管存在少量散射中心，纳米线中仍存在准弹道输运，并表现出持续的Aharonov-Bohm型振荡和相位刚性的Altshuler-Aronov-Spivak型振荡。

title: Finite-temperature Fe K-edge X-ray absorption simulations reveal local structural dynamics of an iron(II) photosensitizer in solution and the crystalline phase
summary: Interpreting metal K-edge spectra of flexible photosensitizers requires a structural model that separates electronic signatures from thermal motion, solvent disorder, and crystal-packing effects. We combine Fe K-edge X-ray absorption measurements with second-generation Car--Parrinello ab initio molecular dynamics and all-electron Gaussian and augmented-plane-wave simulations for an iron(II) N-heterocyclic carbene photosensitizer in acetonitrile solution and in the crystalline phase. Ensemble-averaged spectra reproduce the main near-edge features in both environments and preserve the experimentally observed similarity of the first Fe coordination shell upon dissolution.
