Comparison with radial distributions extracted from extended fine-structure measurements validates the Fe--N and Fe--C coordination shells sampled by the trajectories, while element-resolved pair distributions explain why higher-shell experimental contrast is rapidly lost. The same dynamical ensembles reveal a broad out-of-plane distribution of the terpyridine nitrogen atom and a nearly octahedral distribution of the Fe-centered coordination planes. The results show that finite-temperature X-ray absorption simulations can provide a compact structural-dynamics picture of molecular transition metal photosensitizers by linking local spectra, solvent-phase ligand motion, and medium-range structural disorder within one trajectory-based description.

AI.tldr: 本文结合Fe K-edge X射线吸收测量与从头算分子动力学模拟，揭示了铁(II) N-杂环卡宾光敏剂在溶液和晶体中结构与光谱的关联，证明有限温度X射线吸收模拟能通过单一轨迹描述提供过渡金属光敏剂的局域光谱、配体运动和中等范围结构无序的紧凑图像。
AI.motivation: 解释柔性光敏剂的金属K边光谱需要一种能够区分电子特征与热运动、溶剂无序和晶体堆积效应的结构模型。
AI.method: 结合Fe K-edge X射线吸收实验、第二代Car-Parrinello从头算分子动力学、全电子Gaussian和增强平面波模拟，对乙腈溶液和晶体相中的铁(II) N-杂环卡宾光敏剂进行研究。
AI.result: 系综平均光谱重现了两种环境中的主要近边特征，保留了实验观测到的溶解后第一Fe配位壳层的相似性；径向分布函数验证了Fe-N和Fe-C配位壳层；元素分辨对分布函数解释了高阶壳层实验对比度迅速丢失的原因；动态系综揭示了terpyridine氮原子的宽面外分布和Fe中心配位平面的近八面体分布。
AI.conclusion: 有限温度X射线吸收模拟能够通过基于轨迹的描述，为分子过渡金属光敏剂提供局域光谱、溶剂相配体运动和中等范围结构无序的紧凑结构动力学图像。

title: Dichotomous electronic system in a bilayer Ni$^{1+}$ nickelate
summary: ``Infinite layer'' nickelates (ILNs) ${\cal R}$NiO$_2$ (${\cal R}$=rare earth elements), having empty apical O sites, become superconducting upon hole doping. They display a secondary electron Fermi surface (FS), giving hole doping, arising not from atomic orbitals but from a band based on interstitial density. Newly reported La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_5$F, formally Ni$^{1+}$, provides an unexpected example of ILN with essentially ideal two dimensional character. A partially occupied single band $E^*$, based on interstitial density, has distinct properties, as its strongly anisotropic shape extends over the three ``apical'' layers and leads to a cylindrical electron FS giving self-doping. This interstitial density is associated with a {\it network of valence bands}, including a Ni $d_{xz},d_{yz}$ pair that partners with $E^*$ to provide an incipient non-analytic Dirac point, leading to an unusual type of interstitial density--$d$ band coupling. The $E^*$ electron band and the conventional Ni $dpσ$ band will display a dichotomy of hole and electron quasiparticle behavior in normal state transport and far-IR properties, and likely resulting in unconventional superconducting state properties even for nickelates.

AI.tldr: 这篇论文研究了无限层镍酸盐La₃Ni₂O₅F中一种基于间隙电子密度的特殊能带E*，该能带具有强各向异性、跨三层结构、形成柱状电子费米面并实现自掺杂，同时与Ni d轨道耦合产生非解析狄拉克点，导致空穴和电子准粒子行为的二分性，可能引发非常规超导特性。
AI.motivation: 探索无限层镍酸盐中除传统原子轨道费米面外，由间隙电子密度形成的次级电子费米面及其对超导性质的影响，特别是新发现的La₃Ni₂O₅F这一几乎理想的二维体系中的特殊电子结构。
AI.method: 基于电子结构分析，识别出基于间隙电子密度的部分占据单能带E*，分析其强各向异性形状、跨三层扩展特性、柱状电子费米面形成机制，以及与非解析狄拉克点的关联。
AI.result: 发现E*带与Ni d_xz,d_yz轨道形成伙伴关系，产生非解析狄拉克点，导致间隙密度与d带的异常耦合；E*电子带与常规Ni dpσ带表现出空穴和电子准粒子行为的二分性。
AI.conclusion: 这种特殊的电子结构将导致正常态输运和远红外性质中的空穴/电子准粒子行为二分性，并可能引发镍酸盐中非常规超导态特性。

title: Interaction-driven dynamics in graphene flakes as a benchmark for quantum simulation
summary: We study interaction-driven ultrafast dynamics in finite graphene flakes following an optical pump quench in an interacting tight-binding model. By comparing exact real-time evolution with simulations restricted to particle-hole excitation subspaces, we assess when relaxation can be captured by low-order many-body processes and when this is not sufficient. The single-particle orbital entropy provides a compact diagnostic for dynamic correlation growth. For the systems studied here, periodic graphene flakes are well described by low-order excitations, whereas confined geometries require substantial higher-order contributions even for relatively small interaction strengths. The quench protocol combines simple initial-state preparation with strongly correlated dynamics, identifying a promising benchmark problem for future quantum-computing simulations.

AI.tldr: 研究了石墨烯纳米片在光学泵浦淬火后的超快动力学，通过对比精确演化与低阶粒子-空穴激发模拟，发现周期性薄片可由低阶过程描述，而受限几何结构需要高阶贡献，并提出了量子计算基准问题。
AI.motivation: 探究相互作用驱动的超快动力学在有限石墨烯薄片中的弛豫机制，明确低阶多体过程何时足以描述系统，何时需要高阶贡献。
AI.method: 在相互作用的紧束缚模型中，对比精确实时演化与仅限于粒子-空穴激发子空间的模拟结果；使用单粒子轨道熵作为动态关联增长的紧凑诊断指标。
AI.result: 周期性石墨烯薄片可由低阶激发很好地描述；受限几何结构即使相互作用较弱也需要显著的高阶贡献；淬火协议结合了简单初始态制备与强关联动力学。
AI.conclusion: 该淬火协议可作为未来量子计算模拟的一个有前景的基准问题。

title: Geometry still matters in quasi-one-dimensional single-file transport
summary: Single-file transport means no overtaking: particles move in a narrow channel while preserving their longitudinal order. This simple constraint has profound dynamical consequences, most notably tracer subdiffusion, and has made single-file transport a paradigmatic form of confined many-body motion, observed from molecular transport in zeolites to single-file diffusion of colloids in narrow channels. The standard view is that, once overtaking is suppressed, collective transport reduces to that of a strictly one-dimensional file. Here we show that this reduction fails in experimentally relevant finite-width channels: even when exchange is forbidden, the transverse equilibrium structure controls the transport laws and can qualitatively reshape them. Starting from the Brownian dynamics in the full confined geometry, we derive an exact large-scale one-dimensional fluctuating hydrodynamics for the longitudinal density, whose coefficients are fixed by the confined equilibrium equation of state. In the minimal hard-core setting, this yields a collective diffusivity that can become non-monotonic in density. This geometric anomaly propagates to exact large-scale predictions for integrated-current fluctuations, tracer displacement fluctuations and the associated density profiles. The effect is robust to the interaction potential, channel geometry, initial preparation and microscopic dynamics. Quasi-one-dimensional single-file transport therefore defines a distinct regime in which forbidding overtaking does not erase geometry from collective transport.

AI.tldr: 本文挑战了传统观点：即使粒子不允许超车，有限宽度通道中的单列输运也不等同于严格一维情况。作者从完整约束几何中的布朗运动出发，推导出精确的大尺度一维涨落流体动力学，发现横向平衡结构会定性重塑输运规律，在硬核系统中集体扩散系数甚至出现非单调密度依赖。这一几何异常传播到电流涨落、示踪粒子位移涨落等可观测量的精确预测中，且对相互作用势、通道几何、初始条件和微观动力学具有鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 纠正"单列输运等价于严格一维输运"的标准认知，揭示在实验相关的有限宽度通道中，即使禁止超车，横向平衡结构仍会定性改变输运规律。
AI.method: 从完整约束几何中的布朗动力学出发，推导出纵向密度的大尺度一维涨落流体动力学方程，其系数由约束平衡状态方程确定。
AI.result: 在硬核最小系统中，集体扩散系数呈现非单调密度依赖性；该几何异常传播至积分电流涨落、示踪粒子位移涨落及相关密度分布的精确大尺度预测。
AI.conclusion: 准一维单列输运构成一个独特的输运体系，禁止超车无法抹除几何结构对集体输运的影响，且该效应具有鲁棒性。

title: Magnetism and Topology from Circularly Polarized Phonon Floquet Engineering
summary: We theoretically show that circularly polarized phonons induce electronic magnetization and drive a topological phase transition via phonon Floquet engineering. Considering the electronic states modulated by circularly polarized phonons on a honeycomb lattice, we show that such lattice dynamics generates an effective next-nearest-neighbor electron hopping, leading to a Haldane-type mass term. Circularly polarized phonon breaks time-reversal symmetry (TRS) and opens a gap at valley points, undergoing phase transition from a trivial insulator to a Chern insulator. Moreover, the orbital and spin magnetizations emerge due to the breaking of TRS. Our results show that circularly polarized phonons serve as an effective magnetic field to engineer magnetism and topology, offering new opportunities for phonon Floquet approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文从理论上证明圆极化声子可通过Floquet工程在蜂窝晶格中诱导电子磁化并驱动拓扑相变，产生Haldane型质量项，打破时间反演对称性，实现从平凡绝缘体到Chern绝缘体的相变。
AI.motivation: 探索圆极化声子作为一种有效磁场，在不依赖外加磁场或磁掺杂的情况下，通过声子Floquet工程调控材料的磁性和拓扑性质。
AI.method: 基于蜂窝晶格模型，理论分析圆极化声子调制电子态，推导出有效次近邻电子跳跃项，构建Haldane型质量项，通过打破时间反演对称性打开谷点能隙。
AI.result: 圆极化声子能够诱导轨道磁化和自旋磁化，驱动系统从平凡绝缘体转变为Chern绝缘体，实现拓扑相变。
AI.conclusion: 圆极化声子可作为有效磁场来工程化磁性和拓扑性质，为声子Floquet方法提供了新的机遇。

title: Majorana fermions at self-generated interfaces
summary: The Kitaev model describing a one-dimensional topological superconducting chain is known to support two Majorana fermions localized at the systems endpoints when the parameters are tuned to the topological phase. In this work, we investigate the possibility that Majorana fermions may also emerge away from the physical boundaries of the chain. To this purpose, we generalize the Kitaev model by incorporating a local coupling between the electronic density and a classical elastic (lattice) field. This electron-lattice interaction can induce phase separation between superconducting regions characterized by distinct topological invariants, thereby generating internal interfaces that host Majorana bound states. Under these conditions, a dilute gas of Majorana fermions can be realized in the bulk of the system.

AI.tldr: 本文在Kitaev拓扑超导链模型中引入电子-晶格耦合，发现Majorana费米子不仅存在于端点，还能在系统内部（通过相分离产生的内界面）以稀薄气体形式出现。
AI.motivation: 探索Majorana费米子是否可能出现在一维拓扑超导链的物理边界之外，即系统内部。
AI.method: 将Kitaev模型推广，加入电子密度与经典弹性（晶格）场的局域耦合，利用电子-晶格相互作用诱导不同拓扑不变量的超导区域发生相分离，从而产生内界面。
AI.result: 成功在系统体相内部实现了稀薄Majorana费米子气体，即Majorana束缚态出现在由相分离产生的内界面上。
AI.conclusion: 通过电子-晶格耦合可诱导相分离，使得Majorana费米子从系统端点拓展到体相内部，为在更大空间尺度上操控Majorana态提供了新思路。

title: Efficient analytic continuation approach to Bethe-Salpeter excitation spectra in selected energy windows
summary: We explore the merits of building the Bethe-Salpeter absorption spectrum in a specific energy range using analytic continuation techniques. Specifically, we calculate iteratively a few $\bar{\bar α}(z_k)$ polarizability tensors for a coarse set of $(z_k)$ frequencies in the complex-plane. These data allow constructing a continued-fraction representation for $\bar{\barα}(z)$ that is used to calculate the absorption spectrum close to the real energy axis in the desired energy range. The number and location of these sampling complex frequencies are discussed. The importance of building a continued-fraction representation of the full polarizability tensor with matrix-valued coefficients is emphasized. We show how to extract the poles of the continued fraction as a tool for analyzing the resulting spectra. We study as examples the valence excitations of a paradigmatic dipeptide, the C$_{60}$ fullerene and its PCBM derivative, together with the description of the surface plasmon resonance of the Ag$_{20}$ silver cluster. Further, the high-energy C$_{60}$ X-ray absorption spectrum is explored.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用解析延拓技术高效构建Bethe-Salpeter吸收谱，通过在复平面粗网格上迭代计算少量极化率张量，构建连分式表示来获取目标能量范围内的吸收谱，并展示了在多种材料体系中的应用。
AI.motivation: 传统Bethe-Salpeter方程（BSE）在实频率轴上逐点计算吸收谱计算量巨大，尤其是在高能区或大体系。作者希望通过解析延拓和连分式方法，显著减少所需计算点，提高效率。
AI.method: 1) 在复平面选取一组粗网格频率点(z_k)，迭代计算极化率张量\bar{\barα}(z_k)；2) 构建矩阵系数连分式表示完整的极化率张量；3) 利用该连分式在实轴附近目标能量区间内计算吸收谱；4) 提取连分式的极点作为谱分析工具。讨论了采样点的数量和位置选择策略。
AI.result: 在二肽、C60富勒烯及其PCBM衍生物、Ag20银团簇的表面等离激元共振、以及C60的X射线吸收谱等多个体系中成功验证了该方法，证明少量复频点即可准确重建吸收谱。
AI.conclusion: 解析延拓结合连分式表示是一种高效构建BSE吸收谱的有效方法，特别强调矩阵系数连分式的必要性，极点提取为谱分析提供了有力工具，有望推广到更复杂的激发态计算中。

title: Propagation and localization of spin excitations at altermagnetic domain walls
summary: Altermagnets (A$\ell$Ms) are spin-compensated materials in which opposite-spin sublattices are connected by a symmetry that causes a spin splitting in their elementary excitations. As there is a strong effect of altermagnetism on domain wall properties, it is quite natural to also expect an enrichment of the physics of magnetic excitations at A$\ell$M domain walls. Here, we consider the propagation of spin eigen-excitations along domain walls in easy-axial $d$-wave A$\ell$Ms. Investigating the presence of bound states localized on a domain wall, we find that the effect of the A$\ell$M on the bound states strongly depends on the orientation of the domain wall relative to the crystallographic directions. If the domain wall is oriented along a nodal direction [100] or [010], A$\ell$M does not change the number of bound states; however, it leads to a nonlinear dispersion and a tilt of the wavefront. The effect of A$\ell$M is strongest when the domain wall is oriented along the directions [110] or [$\bar{1}$10], i.e., along the directions of the strongest A$\ell$M splitting in the magnon spectrum. In this case, (i) the additional gapped bound states appear, (ii) degeneracy of the eigenstates with respect to their polarization (right-handed or left-handed precession of the N{é}el vector) is removed, and (iii) the localization area of the bound states strongly depends on the eigenfrequency. The latter may lead to strong localization of the bound state at the domain wall. We further consider the influence of a static magnetic field that is applied along the easy axis, and find that the magnetic field induces an asymmetry between the localization regions on opposite sides of the domain wall and sets an upper limit on the absolute value of the propagating eigenstate's wave vector.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了d波交变磁体中沿畴壁传播的自旋本征激发，发现交磁效应对畴壁束缚态的影响强烈依赖于畴壁相对于晶向的方向，在[110]方向最强，会导致新的带隙束缚态出现、极化简并解除以及束缚态局域化程度随频率强烈变化。
AI.motivation: 交变磁体作为一种新型自旋补偿材料，其畴壁物理比传统反铁磁更丰富。已有研究表明交磁效应对畴壁性质有显著影响，自然也会丰富畴壁处磁激发的物理，但目前对这一方向的研究尚不充分。
AI.method: 理论分析d波易轴交变磁体中沿畴壁传播的自旋本征激发，考察不同畴壁取向（[100]、[010]、[110]、[1-10]）下束缚态的存在情况，并考虑外加静磁场沿易轴方向的影响。
AI.result: (1) 畴壁沿节线方向[100]或[010]时，束缚态数量不变，但出现非线性色散和波前倾斜。(2) 畴壁沿[110]或[1-10]方向时，交磁效应最强：出现额外带隙束缚态、极化简并解除、局域化程度随频率强烈变化。(3) 外加静磁场导致畴壁两侧局域区域不对称，并限制传播本征态的波矢大小。
AI.conclusion: 交变磁体的畴壁取向对磁激发束缚态有决定性影响，沿[110]方向可实现强局域化，结合磁场调控可实现更丰富的畴壁自旋波操控。

title: Extensible links in a broad class of single polymer chain models
summary: The physics of polymer chains is often probed using molecular stretching experiments and various idealized single-chain models. The majority of these models consist of a discrete sequence of links, which may be treated as rigid or extensible. Although such models are well established and many specific extensible variants have been proposed, no generally applicable theory has been presented. Moreover, most existing treatments are heuristic rather than systematically and rigorously derived. This critical gap is closed here through the development of a generally applicable asymptotic theory for including link extensibility in a broad class of discrete models for single-chain thermodynamics. The theory is verified analytically using the freely jointed chain and validated numerically using the freely rotating chain. The resulting approximation is first-order accurate in inverse link stiffness, with quadratically decreasing error, and recovers extensible behavior across all link stiffnesses from a single rigid-link reference calculation.

AI.tldr: 本文针对离散单链热力学模型，提出了一种普适的渐近理论来纳入链节可扩展性，首次系统严格地解决了现有模型缺乏通用理论的问题。该理论在自由连接链上得到解析验证，在自由旋转链上得到数值验证，具有一阶精度和二次递减误差，且仅需一次刚性链节参考计算即可恢复所有链节刚度下的可扩展行为。
AI.motivation: 现有聚合物单链模型多为离散链接模型，虽已提出多种可扩展变体，但缺乏普适性理论；且大多数处理方法是启发式的，缺乏系统严密的推导。作者旨在填补这一关键空白。
AI.method: 开发了一种普适的渐近理论，将链节可扩展性纳入离散单链热力学模型；通过自由连接链进行解析验证，通过自由旋转链进行数值验证。
AI.result: 该近似在逆链节刚度上具有一阶精度，误差以二次方速度递减；仅需一次刚性链节参考计算即可恢复所有链节刚度下的可扩展行为。
AI.conclusion: 成功建立了一种系统严格、普适适用的可扩展链节渐近理论，弥补了离散单链模型领域缺乏一般性理论的空白。

title: Optical fingerprints across the strain-driven semi-Dirac transition in Kekulé-O graphene
summary: We show that the strain-driven semi-Dirac transition in Kekulé-O graphene gives rise to a sequence of anisotropic optical fingerprints associated with band structure reconstruction. Across the transition, optical spectral weight is continuously redistributed among the dominant interband transitions, leading to a pronounced enhancement of the optical anisotropy. Combining numerical four-band calculations with analytical low-energy results, we identify three low-energy fingerprints that emerge with increasing strain: gapped absorption peaks, semi-Dirac critical scaling, and a pronounced van Hove optical resonance. At the semi-Dirac critical point, where the Kekulé gap closes at the $Γ$ point, the low-energy optical conductivity is characterized by $σ_{xx}(Ω)\proptoΩ^{1/2}$ and $σ_{yy}(Ω)\proptoΩ^{-1/2}$. Beyond the transition, the semi-Dirac point splits into two anisotropic Dirac cones, accompanied by the emergence of saddle points near the $Γ$ point. The resulting saddle-point excitations produce a pronounced van Hove optical resonance at energies well below those of graphene, while the split Dirac cones give rise to an anisotropic constant optical conductivity. We further show that the low-energy optical fingerprints can be traced to the continuous evolution of a dominant optical transition channel driven by strain-induced band reconstruction. Moreover, the fingerprints remain identifiable in the presence of moderate disorder broadening and finite-temperature effects, indicating their potential observability under experimentally realistic conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Kekulé-O石墨烯中应变驱动的半狄拉克转变，揭示了由能带重构引起的各向异性光学指纹序列，包括带隙吸收峰、半狄拉克临界标度和范霍夫光学共振，并证明了这些指纹在实验条件下的可观测性。
AI.motivation: 探究Kekulé-O石墨烯在半狄拉克转变过程中的光学特性，揭示应变如何重构能带结构并产生独特的光学指纹。
AI.method: 结合四带数值计算与低能解析结果，分析应变驱动下半狄拉克转变的光学响应，并考虑无序展宽和有限温度效应。
AI.result: 发现三个低能光学指纹：带隙吸收峰、半狄拉克临界标度（σ_xx∝Ω^{1/2}, σ_yy∝Ω^{-1/2}）、以及范霍夫光学共振。半狄拉克点分裂为两个各向异性狄拉克锥，产生低于石墨烯能量的范霍夫共振和各向异性常数光导。
AI.conclusion: 这些低能光学指纹在中等无序和有限温度下仍可识别，具备实验可观测量潜力。

title: Synthetic pre-training of graph-network models for predicting solid-state NMR parameters
summary: Nuclear magnetic resonance (NMR) is a powerful probe of atomic structure, but accurate quantum-mechanical predictions of tensorial NMR parameters are computationally demanding. This creates a bottleneck both for direct quantum-mechanical studies and for collecting high-quality training data for machine-learning (ML) models. Here, we introduce a synthetic pre-training and fine-tuning protocol for graph-based ML models of solid-state NMR parameters. We first pre-train models on synthetic tensorial data, as obtained using an existing ML model, and subsequently fine-tune those models on new ground-truth data. We observe a pronounced improvement in data efficiency when pre-training and fine-tuning span the same compositional and configurational space, and we carry out initial experiments regarding chemical transferability. Our work outlines a route toward future data-efficient training workflows for tensorial ML models for solid-state NMR, combining inexpensive synthetic supervision with targeted first-principles refinement.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对固态NMR张量参数的图神经网络ML模型的合成预训练+微调协议，通过先在合成数据上预训练、再在真实数据上微调，显著提升了数据效率，并初步探索了化学迁移性。
AI.motivation: NMR是探测原子结构的有力工具，但精确的量子力学计算NMR张量参数计算成本极高，无论是直接进行量子力学研究，还是为机器学习模型收集高质量训练数据，都形成了瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出合成预训练+微调协议：先在已有的ML模型生成的合成张量数据上预训练图神经网络，再在新的真实数据（ground-truth data）上进行微调。
AI.result: 当预训练和微调覆盖相同的组成和构型空间时，数据效率显著提升；并初步进行了化学迁移性实验。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为固态NMR张量ML模型未来的数据高效训练流程提供了路线图——将低成本的合成监督与针对性的第一性原理精修相结合。

title: On pseudogap phase as precursor to a superconducting dome in high-Tc cuprates: Non-analytic T* as a function of doping
summary: We generalize the condition under which a quantum material exhibiting a pseudogap phase is a precursor to a superconducting (SC) dome. The result reveals the non-analytic T* as a function of doping. A well-known example is the high-Tc cuprates. Essentially, the SC dome is generated under two conditions: (1) that the pseudogap T* is a decreasing function of doping, due to the decrease in size of extended pairing of doped holes with doping, and most importantly, (2) that the rate of configurational-ordering parameter is an increasing function of doping as a result of the decrease in extended length of the disordered pairs. These two conditions are provided by the new entanglement and confinement pairing mechanism of high-Tc cuprates. This is a theory that has recently been discussed in the literature by Buot et al. It hinges on a novel strong entanglement and confinement hole pairing (ECHP) mechanism that unravels the microscopic features of the entire phase diagram of both electron and hole-doped high-Tc cuprates.

AI.tldr: 本文推广了量子材料中赝隙相作为超导穹顶前驱体的条件，揭示了T*作为掺杂函数的非解析行为，并基于纠缠-束缚空穴配对（ECHP）机制解释了高Tc铜氧化物超导体的完整相图。
AI.motivation: 为了理解赝隙相与超导穹顶之间的内在联系，推广量子材料中超导产生的普遍条件，并解释高Tc铜氧化物中T*随掺杂的非解析行为。
AI.method: 通过建立两个关键条件：(1) 赝隙温度T*随掺杂增加而降低（归因于掺杂空穴扩展配对尺寸减小）；(2) 构型有序参数速率随掺杂增加而升高（归因于无序对扩展长度减小）。这些条件由纠缠-束缚空穴配对（ECHP）机制提供。
AI.result: 揭示了T*作为掺杂函数的非解析特征，并证明了超导穹顶在特定条件下由赝隙相演化而来，形成了电子和空穴掺杂高Tc铜氧化物的完整相图。
AI.conclusion: ECHP机制能够统一描述高Tc铜氧化物的微观相图特征，为理解赝隙相与超导之间的关系提供了一个全新的理论框架。

title: Robust AI-Driven Discovery of Electronic Metal Phosphide Semiconductors
comment: 46 pages, 5 main figures; Supporting Information included
summary: Metal phosphides have diverse bonding motifs and coordination environments, making them promising for optoelectronic and thermoelectric applications, but their chemical space remains underexplored. Here we report an AI-driven high-throughput discovery workflow that combines generative materials design, machine-learning interatomic potentials, and targeted density functional theory (DFT) calculations. ICSD-derived Wyckoff-site substitution and MatterGen-based conditional structure generation are used to expand the candidate space beyond existing phosphide databases. A domain-finetuned DPA3 machine-learning potential then enables efficient prescreening of thermodynamic and dynamical stability before DFT validation. This workflow identifies 3,574 previously unreported stable phosphide structures, including 196 semiconductors with HSE06 band gaps of 0-3.0 eV. By screening these new semiconductors together with experimentally known phosphide semiconductors, we identify 30 promising optoelectronic candidates and 26 promising thermoelectric candidates, including seven newly discovered optoelectronic materials and eight newly discovered thermoelectric materials. These results provide a candidate pool for experimental synthesis and show that combining generative AI with machine-learning interatomic potentials can accelerate the discovery of functional semiconductor materials.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AI驱动的高通量发现流程，结合生成式材料设计、机器学习原子间势和DFT计算，识别出3,574种新型稳定磷化物结构，包括196种半导体，并从中筛选出30种光电候选材料和26种热电候选材料。
AI.motivation: 金属磷化物具有多样的键合模式和配位环境，在光电和热电应用中前景广阔，但其化学空间尚未被充分探索，亟需高效发现方法。
AI.method: 采用ICSD衍生的Wyckoff位点替换和MatterGen条件结构生成扩展候选空间，使用领域微调的DPA3机器学习势进行预筛选，最后通过DFT验证热力学和动力学稳定性。
AI.result: 识别出3,574种此前未报道的稳定磷化物结构，包括196种HSE06带隙在0-3.0 eV的半导体；从中筛选出30种光电候选材料和26种热电候选材料，其中7种光电和8种热电材料为新发现。
AI.conclusion: 将生成式AI与机器学习原子间势相结合，可加速功能半导体材料的发现，为实验合成提供了候选库。

title: Influence of CeO$_2$MnO$_x$ heterostructure on Hydrogen Peroxide Electrogeneration on Carbon-Based Catalysts
summary: The sustainable electrogeneration of hydrogen peroxide (H2O2) via the two-electron oxygen reduction reaction (2e$^-$ ORR) represents a promising alternative to conventional production methods. In this study, CeO2 and CeO2MnOx nanoparticles were synthesized and supported on Vulcan XC-72 carbon at varying loadings (1, 3, and 5%), aiming to assess the lowest metal loading and high H2O2 electrosynthesis. Physicochemical characterizations confirmed the successful formation of CeO2 nanowires and the effectiveness of the MnOx surface modification. XRD, TEM, XPS, EPR, and contact angle analyses revealed that CeO2 loading increased surface hydrophilicity through the presence of oxygenated functional groups, thereby favoring electrochemical activity. On the other hand, all CeO2MnOx loadings were statistically equivalent to Vulcan XC-72 in terms of contact angle. Electrochemical evaluations using a rotating ring-disk electrode (RRDE) demonstrated enhanced ORR activity and high H2O2 selectivity for the 1% CeO2MnOx/C and 3% CeO2/C catalysts, achieving up to 90% selectivity and elevated ring currents. The results suggest that low metal loading and surface modification via MnOx improve the balance between active site exposure, oxygen adsorption, and intermediate stabilization, thus favoring the selective 2e$^-$ pathway. These findings support the development of cost-effective, non-noble-metal catalysts for green H2O2 production via electrosynthesis.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了负载于Vulcan XC-72碳上的CeO₂和CeO₂MnOx纳米颗粒用于电化学合成H₂O₂。1% CeO₂MnOx/C和3% CeO₂/C催化剂在2e⁻ ORR中实现了高达90%的H₂O₂选择性，表明低金属负载和MnOx表面修饰能有效提高催化性能。
AI.motivation: 传统H₂O₂生产方法存在能耗高、污染环境等问题，而电化学合成H₂O₂（2e⁻ ORR）是一种绿色替代方案。开发低成本、非贵金属催化剂是实现这一技术的关键。
AI.method: 合成CeO₂和CeO₂MnOx纳米颗粒，以不同负载量（1%、3%、5%）负载于Vulcan XC-72碳上；通过XRD、TEM、XPS、EPR和接触角分析进行物理化学表征；利用旋转环盘电极（RRDE）进行电化学性能评估。
AI.result: CeO₂负载增加了表面亲水性和含氧官能团，利于电化学活性。1% CeO₂MnOx/C和3% CeO₂/C催化剂在2e⁻ ORR中实现高达90%的选择性和高环电流。MnOx改性不影响接触角但提升了催化性能。
AI.conclusion: 低金属负载和MnOx表面修饰能够优化活性位点暴露、氧吸附和中间体稳定性的平衡，促进选择性2e⁻途径，为开发低成本、非贵金属绿色H₂O₂电合成催化剂提供了可行方向。

title: Nonequilibrium Green Functions Simulations for Large Correlated Systems
summary: Correlated real-time dynamics in large, spatially inhomogeneous quantum systems remain difficult to access with nonequilibrium many-body methods. Two-time nonequilibrium Green functions (NEGF) retain dynamical correlations but their computational runtime grows cubically with the number of time steps $N_\mathrm{t}$. This scaling bottleneck could recently be overcome by introducing the G1--G2 scheme that is linear in $N_\mathrm{t}$, but requires propagation of a two-particle correlation function and may suffer from numerical instabilities. This has restricted simulations to small systems with $N_\mathrm{b} \sim 10^2$ basis states. Here we introduce a quantum-fluctuation formulation of nonequilibrium Green functions, denoted $δ$NEGF, that represents dynamical two-particle correlations through fluctuations of field-operator products, $δ\hat G$. This guarantees stable dynamics by preserving the positivity of the reduced density matrices, avoids the explicit storage of the two-particle Green function, and reduces the propagation to a finite ensemble of Hartree-Fock-like trajectories. Combined with a stochastic low-rank decomposition of the correlation functions, the method retains time-linear scaling while extending dynamical $GW$ and particle-particle and particle-hole $T$-matrix simulations to basis sizes of order $N_\mathrm{b}\sim 10^4$. We benchmark $δ$NEGF against exact and HF-GKBA results for lattice systems, finding stable correlated dynamics also at strong coupling. We further demonstrate large-scale simulations of diffusion in two-dimensional Hubbard lattices and ultrafast relaxation in graphene nanoribbon heterostructures with long-range Coulomb interactions. These results establish $δ$NEGF as a scalable route to dynamical self-energy simulations of large, spatially inhomogeneous correlated quantum systems beyond the reach of existing NEGF implementations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 δNEGF 方法，通过量子涨落表述将两粒子关联函数表示为场算符乘积的涨落，结合随机低秩分解，在保持时间线性标度的同时，将模拟规模从 ~10² 扩展到 ~10⁴ 基态，实现了对大型空间非均匀量子系统的稳定关联动力学模拟。
AI.motivation: 传统非平衡格林函数（NEGF）方法计算时间步数立方增长，G1-G2方案虽线性但存在数值不稳定性且仅适用于小系统（~10²基态）。需要一种既保持时间线性标度又稳定、可扩展的方法来模拟大型空间非均匀量子系统的关联动力学。
AI.method: 提出 δNEGF 量子涨落表述：将动力学两粒子关联通过场算符乘积的涨落 δĜ 表示，保持约化密度矩阵的正性保证稳定动力学；避免显式存储两粒子格林函数；将传播简化为有限系综的 Hartree-Fock 轨迹；结合随机低秩分解，实现时间线性标度。
AI.result: 在格点系统中与精确解和 HF-GKBA 结果对照，验证了强耦合下稳定的关联动力学；展示了二维 Hubbard 晶格扩散和石墨烯纳米带异质结构中长程库仑相互作用下的超快弛豫的大规模模拟，系统规模达 ~10⁴ 基态。
AI.conclusion: δNEGF 建立了一条可扩展的路径，能够将动力学自能模拟推广到超出已有 NEGF 实现能力的大型空间非均匀关联量子系统。

title: Interplay between photon condensation and electron-electron interactions in molecular systems
summary: We investigate a minimal molecular model consisting of square planar plaquettes hosting multiple electrons, whose dynamics is governed by a tight-binding Hamiltonian supplemented by on-site Hubbard repulsion. By coupling this system to a spatially nonuniform cavity mode, we analyze the emergence of a magnetostatic instability, namely photon condensation, originating from the paramagnetic Van Vleck mechanism. The global behavior of the system is analyzed for different electronic filling factors, and we find that, except for the special cases of half-filling and single electron, where the transition, if it occurs, is necessarily a second order phase transition, the global system may also undergo a first order transition because of the action of the electron-electron interaction. The polaritonic excitation energies are analyzed, providing clear spectroscopic signatures of the magnetostatic instability and of its order.

AI.tldr: 研究了一种耦合非均匀腔模式的方形平面晶格电子模型，发现除半填充和单电子情况为二级相变外，电子-电子相互作用可使系统发生一级相变（光子凝聚），并给出了光谱特征。
AI.motivation: 探究在非均匀腔光场作用下，具有Hubbard排斥的多电子方形平面晶格系统中，由顺磁Van Vleck机制引发的磁静力不稳定性（光子凝聚）及其相变性质。
AI.method: 构建紧束缚+Hubbard排斥的方形平面晶格模型，耦合空间非均匀腔模，分析不同电子填充因子下的全局行为，计算极化激元激发能。
AI.result: 除半填充和单电子情况为二级相变外，电子-电子相互作用可使系统发生一级相变；极化激元激发能提供了磁静力不稳定性及其相变级数的清晰光谱特征。
AI.conclusion: 证实了非均匀腔耦合下多电子系统中光子凝聚的存在，揭示了相变级数对电子填充因子的依赖性，并给出了可观测的光谱信号。

title: Neural electron backscatter diffraction
summary: In a polycrystalline microstructure, orientation and dislocation content vary smoothly within grains, and the grain boundaries between them are continuous curves. Electron backscatter diffraction (EBSD) records this continuum on a discrete grid with every subsequent analysis (from indexing to advanced pattern processing) confined to that grid. We introduce neural EBSD, which treats an EBSD scan as a continuous, differentiable four-dimensional field of Kikuchi diffraction intensity (in specimen--detector domain) and then represents it with a coordinate-based neural network. We develop and compare two formulations: a joint formulation that maps all four coordinates to intensity, and a factorized formulation that combines continuous specimen-domain coefficient fields with learned detector-domain basis patterns. Tested on recrystallized and additively manufactured Inconel 718, the factorized formulation shows better accuracy in reconstructing Kikuchi patterns that have map-averaged errors below 1% of the maximum intensity. Beyond reconstruction, it provides full-pattern super-resolution in the specimen frame, continuous querying along arbitrary off-grid paths, as well as spatially continuous boundary and heterogeneity localization from analytical spatial derivatives. Storing the network weights and learned bases in place of the raw patterns in a large dataset offers a 700-fold compression while preserving on-demand access to the full patterns for downstream analyses.

AI.tldr: 本文提出神经EBSD方法，利用坐标基神经网络将EBSD扫描表示为连续可微的四维Kikuchi衍射强度场。分解式公式在重建精度、超分辨率、连续查询和压缩比（700倍）方面表现优异。
AI.motivation: 传统EBSD将连续微结构记录在离散网格上，后续分析受限于网格分辨率，无法进行连续查询和亚像素级分析。
AI.method: 提出两种神经表示：联合公式（四坐标→强度）和分解公式（连续样品域系数场+探测器域基函数）。后者通过神经网络学习连续表示。
AI.result: 分解公式在重建Kikuchi图案时平均误差低于最大强度的1%；实现全图案超分辨率、任意离网路径查询；通过解析空间导数进行边界和异质性定位；实现700倍数据压缩。
AI.conclusion: 神经EBSD可将离散EBSD数据转化为连续可微表示，兼顾高精度重建、超分辨率分析、连续空间查询和高压缩比，为后续微结构分析提供新范式。

title: Fractional shot noise of an SU(N) Kondo system
summary: We consider transport through a multi-level interacting quantum dot (N-QD) in Kondo regime. Using the Kotliar-Ruckentein slave boson approach (SBMFA) for N-level Anderson model we define effectively noninteracting quasiparticles of the SU(N) Kondo system ($N=2,3,4,5,6$). Kondo resonance transmission coefficients determine linear noise describing quasiparticle partitioning. To discuss nonlinear conductance, susceptibilities and shot noise in the strong coupling regime, we apply Fermi liquid theory with parameters expressed by susceptibilities of pseudofermions determined within SBMFA. Nonlinear shot noise is dominated by two-quasiparticle scattering. However, we demonstrate that for occupation regions distant from the electron-hole symmetry point, the role of three-body correlations must be revealed.

AI.tldr: 本文利用Kotliar-Ruckenstein奴隶玻色子方法研究多能级相互作用量子点在Kondo区间的输运性质，包括线性噪声、非线性电导和散粒噪声。
AI.motivation: 研究多能级相互作用量子点(N-QD)在Kondo区间的输运行为，特别是超出电子-空穴对称点区域的三体关联效应。
AI.method: 采用Kotliar-Ruckenstein奴隶玻色子方法(SBMFA)处理N能级Anderson模型，结合费米液体理论分析强耦合区间的非线性输运性质。
AI.result: 非线性散粒噪声主要由双准粒子散射主导，但在远离电子-空穴对称点的占据区域，三体关联效应不可忽略。
AI.conclusion: 三体关联在多能级Kondo系统的非线性输运中起到重要作用，特别是偏离对称点的情况下。

title: Quantum statistics in an extended collider coupled to a qubit
comment: Main text: 6 pages and 2 figures, Appendix: 13 pages
summary: Mesoscopic colliders provide an effective platform for probing the mutual statistics of quantum particles. Recent experiments have successfully extracted the mutual statistics of fermions, and more exotic anyons using quantum point contacts (QPCs). Coupling a point-like collider, such as a quantum point contact, to a two-level impurity or qubit can induce statistical transmutation of fermions, causing them to display boson-like bunching tendencies. Here, we extend the analysis to an extended collider. We investigate the scattering of two incoming fermionic and bosonic wave packets in the presence of post-selection on the impurity state, and systematically analyze the possible benchmarks used to characterize bunching and infer the underlying mutual statistics. We show that only a specific benchmark faithfully captures the mutual statistics of the colliding particles, while alternative choices can produce spurious statistical signatures. Hence, the correct benchmark for probing the quantum statistics depends on the intricate details of the mesoscopic collider.

AI.tldr: 本文研究介观碰撞器中的量子统计探测问题，发现粒子聚束的基准选择会影响对交换统计的推断，只有特定基准才能准确反映费米子或玻色子的本征统计特性。
AI.motivation: 近期实验已成功利用量子点接触提取费米子及任意子的互统计，但耦合到二能级杂质时费米子会表现出类玻色子的聚束倾向。作者希望扩展到扩展型碰撞器场景，并澄清哪些聚束基准能真正反映粒子的本征互统计。
AI.method: 基于后选杂质态的框架，系统分析两种入射费米子/玻色子波包在扩展碰撞器中的散射过程，对比多种聚束基准的表现。
AI.result: 只有特定基准能忠实捕捉碰撞粒子的互统计，其他基准可能产生虚假的统计特征。
AI.conclusion: 探测量子统计的正确基准取决于介观碰撞器的具体细节，不可一概而论。

title: Probing Spin Configurations in Exchange-Coupled Magnetic Bilayers with Orthogonal Anisotropies via Anomalous Hall and Nernst Effects
summary: When two ferromagnetic thin films with different magnetic easy axes are coupled via the exchange interaction, the magnetization process becomes nontrivial. In this paper, we demonstrate that three-dimensional magnetization information in such a bilayer system can be accessed electrically by combining measurements of the anomalous Hall effect (AHE) and anomalous Nernst effect (ANE). Specifically, we investigate a CoFe$_2$O$_4$(001)/Fe bilayer, where the insulating nature of CoFe$_2$O$_4$ ensures that these transport measurements selectively probe only the conductive Fe layer. By combining the AHE and ANE results and comparing them with a simple micromagnetic simulation, we probe the magnetic configuration of antiferromagnetically coupled Fe layer and suggest the emergence of a twisted magnetic structure near the interface.

AI.tldr: 本文通过结合反常霍尔效应（AHE）和反常能斯特效应（ANE）的电学测量，成功获取了交换耦合双层薄膜体系（CoFe₂O₄(001)/Fe）的三维磁化信息，揭示了反铁磁耦合Fe层中靠近界面处存在扭曲磁结构。
AI.motivation: 当两个具有不同磁易轴的铁磁薄膜通过交换相互作用耦合时，磁化过程变得复杂，传统方法难以获取完整的三维磁化信息。作者希望开发一种电学方法来探测这类体系中的三维磁化结构。
AI.method: 利用CoFe₂O₄的绝缘特性，使电输运测量仅探测导电Fe层。结合反常霍尔效应（AHE）和反常能斯特效应（ANE）的测量结果，并与微磁学模拟进行对比分析。
AI.result: 成功获取了反铁磁耦合Fe层的磁构型信息，发现靠近界面处存在扭曲的磁结构。
AI.conclusion: AHE与ANE的组合测量是一种有效的电学手段，可用于研究交换耦合双层薄膜体系中的三维磁化行为，尤其是界面扭曲磁结构。

title: Thermal Signatures of the Slater-Mott Crossover in the Hubbard Model: From Double Occupancy to Antiferromagnetic Correlation Length
summary: The interaction-driven crossover from a Slater insulator to a Mott insulator in the Néel-ordered ground state of the Hubbard model is a fundamental paradigm of strongly correlated electrons, yet its quantitative characterization has remained elusive. Here we establish a clear and experimentally accessible thermal criterion for this crossover via the sign change of the temperature derivative of double occupancy, $(\partial D/\partial T)_U$, near zero temperature. In the Slater regime, $(\partial D/\partial T)_U>0$ reflects the major role of charge fluctuations; in the Mott regime, the anomalous $(\partial D/\partial T)_U<0$, a manifestation of the Pomeranchuk effect, signals the dominance of low-energy spin superexchange physics. Using exact diagonalization and {\it numerically exact} quantum Monte Carlo simulations, we demonstrate that this criterion determines the crossover boundary at $U_{\rm cross}/t=4.0(2)$ for the half-filled two-dimensional Hubbard model. Furthermore, we obtain a consistent boundary independently from the maximum in the antiferromagnetic correlation length, which also arises from the superexchange physics. These two thermal signatures are theoretically unified through the local minimum of thermal entropy versus interaction $U$ at low temperatures. Our results offer a direct, measurable, and physically intuitive framework to identify the Slater-Mott crossover in optical lattice experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文通过温度导数符号变化（∂D/∂T）_U定义了Hubbard模型中Slater绝缘体到Mott绝缘体的热力学交叉判据，利用精确对角化和量子蒙特卡洛模拟确定了二维半填充Hubbard模型的交叉边界U_cross/t=4.0(2)，并从反铁磁关联长度和热熵最小值得到一致结果，为光晶格实验提供了可测量的识别框架。
AI.motivation: Slater绝缘体到Mott绝缘体的交叉是强关联电子的基本范式，但长期以来缺乏定量表征方法。本文旨在建立一个清晰且实验可观测的热力学判据来区分这两种绝缘体。
AI.method: 利用双重占据数温度导数(∂D/∂T)_U的符号变化作为判据；采用精确对角化和数值精确的量子蒙特卡洛模拟；分析反铁磁关联长度最大值和低温热熵最小值作为独立验证。
AI.result: 交叉边界位于U_cross/t=4.0(2)；Slater区域(∂D/∂T)_U>0（电荷涨落主导），Mott区域(∂D/∂T)_U<0（Pomeranchuk效应，自旋超交换主导）；反铁磁关联长度最大值给出一致边界。
AI.conclusion: 该热力学判据提供了直接、可测量且物理直观的框架，可用于光晶格实验中识别Slater-Mott交叉。

title: Optical-like interference control polar-phonons dispersions in 2D materials
summary: It has been argued that the polar phonon modes of two-dimensional (2D) materials should show a linear dependence close to the Brillouin zone center due to the reduced problem dimensionality compared to a three-dimensional crystal, leading to a vanishing LO-TO splitting. Revisiting this question using a mirror-charge framework derived from classical electrostatics, we show that it is not always true: with perfectly-reflective dielectric interfaces, it is possible to recover a LO-TO splitting, or an equivalent phenomenon for the out-of-plane modes. Effectively, the dispersion of polar phonon modes is governed by optical-like constructive and destructive interferences of the source potential with its reflection at the dielectric interfaces. This work highlights the critical role of dielectric boundary conditions to understand phonon-related properties in 2D materials.

AI.tldr: 经典电动力学表明，在完美反射介电界面条件下，二维材料的极性声子模式可以恢复LO-TO分裂，这推翻了先前认为二维材料中LO-TO分裂必然消失的观点。
AI.motivation: 挑战"二维材料极性声子模式在布里渊区中心呈线性色散且LO-TO分裂消失"这一广泛接受的理论观点。
AI.method: 采用基于经典电动力学的镜像电荷框架，分析介电边界条件对二维材料极性声子模式色散的影响。
AI.result: 当介电界面具有完美反射特性时，二维材料中可以恢复LO-TO分裂（或面外模式的等效现象）；极性声子模式的色散由源势与其在介电界面上的反射之间的光学类干涉决定。
AI.conclusion: 介电边界条件对理解二维材料的声子相关性质至关重要，推翻了以往对二维极性声子行为的简单化认知。

title: Field-Induced Up-Up-Down State and Frustrated Magnetism in a Non-Kramers Triangular Antiferromagnet
summary: A previously unreported triangular lattice (TL) antiferromagnet, TmZnGaO4, was synthesized as single crystals, and its crystal structure, magnetic susceptibilities, and specific heat were reported. Its crystal structure is isomorphic to that of the transverse-field Ising antiferromagnet TmMgGaO4, with Tm3+ ions located in the TLs, separated by a nonmagnetic bilayer composed mainly of Ga3+ and Zn2+ ions. The magnetic susceptibilities indicate the dominating antiferromagnetic interactions. The magnetization curves (M-H) exhibit strong easy-c-axis anisotropy, with a clear one-third magnetic plateau emerging, consistent with a field-induced up-up-down spin configuration. Instead of forming a conventional long-range magnetic order, the system exhibits two broad anomalies at 0.11 K and 2.81 K in zero-field specific heat measurements, highlighting the persistence of strong spin fluctuations and the potential for exotic quantum spin states. The above results reveal its future interest in exploring exotic quantum spin states in TmZnGaO4.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了一种新型三角晶格反铁磁材料TmZnGaO4的单晶合成及物性表征，发现其存在强自旋涨落和1/3磁化平台，为探索新奇量子自旋态提供了新平台。
AI.motivation: 寻找新的三角晶格量子自旋体系，探索可能存在的奇异量子自旋态（如量子自旋液体等）。
AI.method: 单晶生长、晶体结构解析、磁化率及比热等热力学测量。
AI.result: 1）TmZnGaO4与TmMgGaO4同构，Tm³⁺构成三角晶格；2）磁化率表明占主导的反铁磁相互作用；3）M-H曲线显示强易c轴各向异性，出现清晰的1/3磁化平台（场诱导的上-上-下自旋构型）；4）零场比热在0.11 K和2.81 K呈现两个宽峰，而非传统长程磁有序峰，表明强自旋涨落持续存在。
AI.conclusion: TmZnGaO4是一个有前景的三角晶格量子自旋系统，值得进一步探索其可能存在的奇异量子自旋态。

title: Extending Field Limits in Nanoscale Magnetic Imaging with Metamaterial-inspired Magnetic Flux Concentrators
comment: Submitted and accepted manuscript versions for Small (Wiley). To be published (Article DOI: 10.1002/smll.202600073)
summary: Many nanoscale magnetic imaging techniques are constrained by the maximum magnetic field that can be applied during measurements, due to geometrical limitations or interactions with the probe or the detected signal (e.g., electrons). Here, it is demonstrated that sample-integrated metamaterial-inspired magnetic flux concentrators (MFCs) locally amplify magnetic fields, allowing observation of magnetization processes beyond instrumental limits. Micrometer-sized MFCs fabricated directly on the samples are tested in photoemission electron microscopy experiments employing X-ray magnetic circular dichroism as magnetic contrast mechanism. At low applied fields, substantial amplification factors enable observation of magnetization reversal in a chain of magnetite nanoparticles synthesized by magnetotactic bacteria at an applied field of 8 mT, substantially smaller than the 50 mT predicted by simulations in absence of MFCs. At higher fields, the field enhancement extends the accessible field range by a factor of five, enabling for the first time, imaging of the field-dependent magnetic domain structure evolution of an isolated giant magnetofossil. Finally, we show how MFC geometry and material parameters can be tuned to optimize performance considering sample and experimental constraints, providing a tunable and broadly applicable strategy for extending the accessible field range in a wide variety of nanoscale magnetic imaging techniques.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了将超材料启发的磁通集中器（MFC）直接集成到样品上，可以局部放大磁场，从而突破纳米磁成像技术在磁场施加范围上的仪器限制。在光发射电子显微镜实验中，MFC使磁铁矿纳米颗粒链在8 mT低场下实现磁化反转（无MFC时需50 mT），并将孤立巨磁化石的成像场范围扩展了五倍。文章还讨论了通过调节MFC几何与材料参数来优化性能的策略。
AI.motivation: 许多纳米级磁成像技术由于几何限制或与探针/检测信号（如电子）的相互作用，在测量时能施加的最大磁场受到约束。作者希望克服这一限制，从而在更宽广的磁场范围内观察磁化过程。
AI.method: 在样品上直接制备微米级超材料启发的磁通集中器（MFC），结合光发射电子显微镜（PEEM）和X射线磁圆二色性（XMCD）进行磁性成像。通过实验测试MFC对磁场的放大效果，并调节MFC的几何结构和材料参数以优化性能。
AI.result: 低场下，MFC使磁铁矿纳米颗粒链在8 mT下即可观测到磁化反转，远小于模拟预测的无MFC时的50 mT。高场下，MFC将可访问的场范围扩展了五倍，首次实现了孤立巨磁化石场依赖磁畴结构演变的成像。
AI.conclusion: MFC提供了一种可调谐、广泛适用的策略，能够有效扩展多种纳米磁成像技术的可访问磁场范围，突破仪器限制。

title: Hybrid Hamiltonian-diagrammatic quantum impurity solver
summary: Quantum impurity models, which describe the coupling between interacting orbitals and a non-interacting bath, play a central role in the physics of strongly correlated electron systems. Solving a quantum impurity model in general requires the use of non-perturbative numerical methods. Hamiltonian-based approaches, which rely on an explicit bath discretization, are typically limited to a small number of bath sites or small entanglement, and diagrammatic methods suffer from sign problems, slow convergence, or diagram truncation approximations. Here we show that these two classes of methods can be combined: augmenting diagrammatic methods with a small auxiliary bath can reduce the residual problem to a regime where low-order perturbation theory is highly accurate and rapidly converging. In a simple benchmark, the precision of the hybrid approach surpasses bold-line calculations by several orders of magnitude; for a strongly interacting two-orbital model with a severe sign problem, convergence is achieved at three orders of magnitude lower computational cost than competing methods; and convergence to the unknown exact result is rapidly accelerated in a difficult realistic problem. Our results establish a practical route to high-precision quantum impurity solutions in correlated quantum systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种混合方法，将图解方法与辅助小浴池结合，在保留非微扰能力的同时大幅提升精度和收敛速度，解决了量子杂质模型中传统哈密顿量方法受限于小体系、图解方法收敛慢或符号问题等挑战，在多个基准测试中展现了数量级上的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 量子杂质模型是强关联电子系统的核心，但现有两类解法各有局限：基于哈密顿量的方法受限于浴池离散化导致的规模小或纠缠小；图解方法则面临符号问题、收敛慢或图解截断近似。因此需要一种能结合两者优势的新方法。
AI.method: 将图解方法与一个小型辅助浴池结合，利用辅助浴池将残差问题降低到低阶微扰论高度精确且快速收敛的区间，从而融合哈密顿量方法与图解方法的优势。
AI.result: 在简单基准测试中，混合方法的精度超过bold-line计算几个数量级；在符号问题严重的强相互作用双轨道模型中，计算成本比竞争方法低三个数量级；在实际困难问题中，能快速加速收敛到未知精确结果。
AI.conclusion: 该混合方法为关联量子系统中实现高精度量子杂质解提供了一条实用路径。

title: Flower-like WO3-modified Vulcan carbon GDEs for photoelectro-Fenton process: Efficient ciprofloxacin degradation and mechanistic insights
summary: Electrochemical H2O2 synthesis was investigated using a 3 percent WO3 C gas diffusion electrode GDE. The catalyst outperformed bare Vulcan carbon, generating H2O2 concentrations of 423, 586, and 916 mg L at 50, 75, and 100 mA cm2, respectively, maintaining around 70 percent current efficiency. This performance and lower energy consumption are attributed to the WO3 carbon synergistic effect. In electro Fenton EF applications, the WO3 C GDE achieved rapid initial ciprofloxacin CIP degradation of around 70 percent in 30 min, though limited later by slow Fe2 regeneration. Incorporating UV light photoelectro Fenton overcame this constraint, yielding complete CIP removal within 90 min, while a boron doped diamond BDD anode enhanced total organic carbon TOC mineralization to 66 percent. The proposed degradation mechanism proceeds via hydroxyl radical attack on the piperazine ring with or without defluorination and quinolone ring oxidation, with theoretical analysis confirming reduced environmental toxicity of the transformation products. Overall, WO3 C GDEs represent a highly efficient strategy for H2O2 generation and wastewater remediation.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了WO3/C气体扩散电极用于电化学H2O2合成及废水修复，该电极在电芬顿和光电芬顿应用中高效降解环丙沙星，并通过理论分析验证了降解产物的环境毒性降低。
AI.motivation: 传统电化学H2O2合成和电芬顿降解有机污染物过程中存在效率低、能耗高以及Fe2+再生缓慢等问题，亟需开发高效催化剂和工艺。
AI.method: 采用3% WO3/C气体扩散电极进行电化学H2O2合成；在电芬顿（EF）和光电芬顿（PEF）工艺中降解环丙沙星（CIP）；使用硼掺杂金刚石（BDD）阳极增强矿化；通过理论计算分析降解路径和毒性。
AI.result: WO3/C GDE在50、75、100 mA/cm²下分别产生423、586、916 mg/L H2O2，电流效率约70%；电芬顿30 min降解约70% CIP；光电芬顿90 min完全去除CIP，BDD阳极TOC矿化率达66%。
AI.conclusion: WO3/C GDE是一种高效、低能耗的H2O2合成和废水修复策略，光电芬顿组合可克服Fe2+再生限制，实现完全降解和高效矿化，且降解产物环境毒性降低。

title: Ultra-Soft Ferrimagnetism in a High-Entropy Spinel Oxide Driven by Site-Selective Cation Disorder
summary: High-entropy materials are complex, multifunctional materials that have reshaped the design of advanced functional materials. Their chemically diverse compositions enable access to a broader compositional space than conventional solid solutions, while simultaneously posing significant challenges for fundamental structure property understanding. In this study, we introduce a new highentropy spinel oxide with an exceptionally low coercivity of 1.8 Oe at room temperature, among the lowest reported for bulk spinel oxides, and a high electrical resistivity (1560 ohm-cm). Neutron powder diffraction (NPD) and magnetic measurements reveal long-range collinear ferrimagnetic ordering (k = 0,0,0) with a transition temperature at 420 K. This rare combination of ultra-soft magnetic behavior, robust ferrimagnetic ordering well above room temperature, and high resistivity highlights its strong potential as an advanced soft-magnetic oxide for low-loss, high-frequency applications. Furthermore, X-ray absorption spectroscopy (XAS), Mossbauer spectroscopy, and NPD analyses were combined to determine the cation distribution and site selectivity across the tetrahedral and octahedral sites of the complex structure.

AI.tldr: 本研究报道了一种新型高熵尖晶石氧化物，具有极低的矫顽力（1.8 Oe）和高电阻率（1560 ohm-cm），在室温下呈现长程共线亚铁磁有序，是高性能软磁氧化物的潜在候选材料。
AI.motivation: 高熵材料因其化学组成多样性可探索更广阔的组分空间，但同时也给基本结构-性能理解带来挑战。本文旨在解决这一矛盾，探索具有优异软磁性能的新型高熵材料。
AI.method: 采用中子粉末衍射（NPD）、X射线吸收光谱（XAS）、穆斯堡尔谱和磁测量等多种表征手段，结合阳离子分布与位点选择性分析，系统研究了新型高熵尖晶石氧化物的结构和磁性能。
AI.result: 发现该材料具有极低矫顽力（1.8 Oe，室温下为块体尖晶石氧化物最低值之一）、高电阻率（1560 ohm-cm）、长程共线亚铁磁有序（传播矢量k=0,0,0）以及420 K的居里温度。
AI.conclusion: 该材料兼具超软磁行为、室温以上的强亚铁磁有序和高电阻率，是低损耗、高频应用的先进软磁氧化物的有力候选者。

title: Roughness-robust surface altermagnetism in $PT$ antiferromagnets
summary: Surface altermagnetism extends spin splitting beyond bulk altermagnets through symmetry reduction at surfaces and interfaces. An existing classification applies to the local symmetry of atomically flat surface terraces. The present paper addresses the symmetry of macroscopic spin-momentum correlations that survive averaging over compensated rough surfaces. These correlations are governed by the surface antisymmetry Laue point group. Rough-surface altermagnetism is forbidden at any surface of a magnet whose antisymmetry space group contains antitranslations, and the classification therefore reduces to $PT$-symmetric antiferromagnets. By restoring all symmetries leaving the surface normal invariant, roughness can generate compensated surface altermagnets from uncompensated flat terminations, increase the surface symmetry, or suppress spin splitting. By combining bulk switchability with altermagnetic surface transport properties, roughness-robust surface altermagnetism in $PT$-symmetric antiferromagnets provides a route toward spintronic functionality.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了粗糙表面下反铁磁体中的表面交变磁性（altermagnetism），提出了表面反称Laue点群分类，发现PT对称反铁磁体在粗糙表面仍能保持交变磁性，为自旋电子学提供新路径。
AI.motivation: 已有的表面交变磁性分类仅适用于原子级平整的台阶面，而真实表面往往是粗糙且补偿的。本文旨在建立粗糙表面下宏观自旋-动量关联的对称性理论，探索粗糙表面交变磁性的存在条件。
AI.method: 利用表面反称Laue点群（surface antisymmetry Laue point group）对粗糙表面的对称性进行分类，通过分析磁体的反称空间群是否包含反平移操作来判断粗糙表面交变磁性是否被禁止，并研究对称性恢复如何影响自旋劈裂。
AI.result: (1) 粗糙表面交变磁性在含有反平移操作的磁体中被禁止，因此分类简化为PT对称反铁磁体；(2) 粗糙化可以从不补偿的平整表面产生补偿的表面交变磁体，提高表面对称性，或抑制自旋劈裂；(3) PT对称反铁磁体中的粗糙表面交变磁性兼具体态可开关性和表面输运特性。
AI.conclusion: 粗糙表面交变磁性为PT对称反铁磁体在自旋电子学中的应用提供了可行路线，因其鲁棒性（不受表面粗糙度影响）且兼具体态可调控与表面输运优势。

title: Layer-parity-dependent interfacial coupling in Nb$_3$Cl$_8$/graphene van der Waals heterostructures
summary: Strongly correlated two-dimensional systems provide compelling platforms for investigating exotic quantum phenomena. Niobium chloride (Nb$_3$Cl$_8$), a single-band Mott insulator, exhibits a remarkable out-of-plane polarization in its topmost layer that oscillates with layer parity, manifesting as an odd-even effect. Using atomic force microscopy (AFM) and Kelvin probe force microscopy (KPFM), this layer-parity-dependent polarization can be effectively characterized through surface morphology and potential mapping, enabling the unambiguous identification of different surface phases. We then fabricated dual-gate Hall devices by coupling different surface phases of Nb$_3$Cl$_8$ with monolayer graphene to investigate how the topmost-layer out-of-plane polarization influences interfacial coupling and the resulting transport behavior. Our results reveal significant phase-dependent variations in charge transfer, carrier densities, and hybridization gaps (25.2 meV for Phase 1 and 30.0 meV for Phase 2). Density functional theory calculations corroborate these experimental findings, showing that distinct out-of-plane polarizations in the topmost layer lead to different orbital overlaps and interfacial coupling strengths. These findings highlight the critical importance of surface polarization and orbital orientation in engineering the properties of strongly correlated van der Waals heterostructures.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了Nb₃Cl₈的层奇偶依赖极化效应，通过AFM和KPFM表征表面相，并将其与单层石墨烯耦合构建双栅霍尔器件，发现顶层极化显著影响界面耦合和输运行为（杂化能隙分别为25.2 meV和30.0 meV），强调了表面极化和轨道取向在强关联范德华异质结工程设计中的重要性。
AI.motivation: 探索强关联二维体系中层奇偶依赖的极化效应，以及顶层极化如何影响异质结界面耦合和输运行为。
AI.method: 利用AFM和KPFM表征表面形貌和电势；构建双栅霍尔器件将Nb₃Cl₈不同表面相与单层石墨烯耦合；结合DFT计算验证实验现象。
AI.result: 观察到显著相依赖的电荷转移、载流子密度和杂化能隙（Phase 1: 25.2 meV, Phase 2: 30.0 meV）；DFT证实顶层极化差异导致不同的轨道重叠和界面耦合强度。
AI.conclusion: 表面极化和轨道取向在调控强关联范德华异质结的性质中起关键作用，为工程设计提供了新思路。

title: Degeneracy and trajectory control of spin eigenmodes excited by fs-optical pulses in a nearly compensated ferrimagnet
summary: We investigate optically excited spin dynamics in a uniaxial ferrimagnet near the magnetization compensation point under a magnetic field applied along the magnetic anisotropy axis. Experiment and numerical modeling reveal an unusual regime where the frequencies of two spin eigenmodes approach each other and become highly field sensitive. The modes, corresponding to opposite rotations of the Neel vector, simultaneously reverse their handedness at a critical field where their frequencies become degenerate. At this point, the two-frequency precessional dynamics collapses into a linear oscillations directed along the inverse-Faraday-effect excitation induced by a single pump pulse. We further show that a double-pulse excitation scheme enables control of the spin trajectory. These results uncover an unconventional dynamical regime in ferrimagnets and establish new opportunities for manipulating spin motion in magnonic systems and devices.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在磁补偿点附近，单轴铁磁体中自旋激发的异常动力学行为，发现两种自旋本征模在临界磁场下频率简并、手性反转，并导致双频率进动塌缩为线性振荡，双脉冲激发可控制自旋轨迹。
AI.motivation: 探索铁磁体在磁补偿点附近、磁场沿磁各向异性轴施加时，光激发自旋动力学是否存在异常模式，尤其是两种自旋本征模的相互作用及其物理机制。
AI.method: 采用光激发实验与数值建模相结合的方法，研究单轴铁磁体中自旋动力学，通过单脉冲和双脉冲激发方案观察自旋轨迹的变化。
AI.result: 发现两种自旋本征模频率在临界磁场下相互接近并变得高度磁场敏感，模式手性同时反转，频率简并时双频率进动塌缩为沿逆法拉第效应激发方向的线性振荡。双脉冲激发可实现自旋轨迹控制。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了铁磁体中一种非常规动力学机制，为操控磁振子系统中的自旋运动提供了新途径，对自旋电子学和磁振子器件具有潜在应用价值。

title: Ab initio study of magnetism in pristine and defective MnBi2Te4
comment: 10 pages, 5 figures, 3 tables. Includes Appendix and Supplemental Material
summary: The magnetic material MnBi2Te4 (MBT) has garnered significant attention due to its unique combination of long-range antiferromagnetism and nontrivial topological electronic properties. However, experimental measurements report inconsistent magnetizations, which could be attributed to a variety of intrinsic defects. To date, a comprehensive investigation of defect-engineered MBT systems has not yet been established. Employing state-of-the-art $ab~initio$ techniques, this work systematically investigates the influence of various experimentally reported defects on the magnetic properties of bulk and monolayer MBT at different concentrations. Mn-vacancy and Mn-rich defects are found to enhance the ferromagnetism of bulk MBT. The investigation of Mn-rich and intermixing defects in the monolayer reveals that subtle structural and electronic modifications can alter the magnetic coupling. Projection onto a Heisenberg Hamiltonian demonstrates that defects modify exchange interactions, thereby giving rise to distinct magnetic ground states. This work sheds light on magnetic coupling mechanisms and provides guidelines for the experimental control of magnetism in MnBi2Te4.

AI.tldr: 本文利用第一性原理计算，系统研究了不同缺陷（如Mn空位、Mn富集、原子互混）对MnBi2Te4体相和单层磁性的影响，发现缺陷能增强铁磁性或改变磁耦合，从而调节磁基态。
AI.motivation: 实验上MnBi2Te4磁化测量结果不一致，推测与各种本征缺陷有关，但目前缺乏对缺陷工程化MBT系统的全面研究。
AI.method: 采用先进的第一性原理（ab initio）计算方法，系统研究多种实验报道的缺陷在不同浓度下对体相和单层MBT磁性质的影响，并将结果投影到海森堡哈密顿量分析交换相互作用。
AI.result: Mn空位和Mn富集缺陷能增强体相MBT的铁磁性；单层中Mn富集和原子互混缺陷通过细微的结构和电子修饰改变磁耦合，导致不同的磁基态。
AI.conclusion: 阐明了缺陷调控磁耦合的机制，为实验上控制MnBi2Te4的磁性提供了指导。

title: Direction-Dependent Quantum Transport Properties of MoS$_2$ Integrated into Biphenylene Configuration
summary: Motivated by the experimental realization of the two-dimensional (2D) carbon biphenylene network (BPN), the theoretical extension of the BPN topology to various groups of elements was successfully implemented. In this work, we conducted first principles and quantum transport calculations to reveal the electronic, thermal, thermoelectric performance and current-voltage (\textit{I-V}) behavior of the pristine MoS$_2$-BPN by using density functional theory (DFT) combined with Non-Equilibrium Green's Function (NEGF) formalism. At room temperature, the phonon thermal conductance is remarkably low along both the armchair and zigzag orientations, with values of 0.28 nW/K and 0.23 nW/K, respectively. The directional dependence of the electronic and thermal transport properties is clearly reflected in the thermoelectric figure of merit ($zT$) values, which reach first peaks at 0.27 and 0.19 along the armchair and zigzag directions, respectively. The current-voltage ($I-V$) characteristics demonstrate an exceptionally strong transport anisotropy, characterized by a substantial current ratio of $I_{\text{armchair}}/I_{\text{zigzag}} \approx 7 \times 10^4$. Furthermore, while the current along the armchair direction increases steadily with the applied bias, transport along the zigzag direction is characterized by a pronounced intrinsic negative differential conductance (NDC). This contrast highlights fundamentally distinct charge transport mechanisms along the two orthogonal axes. Consequently, different directions of this BPN phase of MoS$_2$ can be tailored for distinct nanoelectronic applications, where the armchair and zigzag axes serve as a reliable current switch and an active NDC device, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理和量子输运计算，研究了原始MoS₂-联苯网络（BPN）的电子、热、热电性能及电流-电压特性。发现该材料在室温下具有极低的声子热导（0.28/0.23 nW/K），显著的热电优值各向异性（zT峰值0.27/0.19），以及极强的输运各向异性（电流比~7×10⁴），其中锯齿形方向展现出明显的负微分电导（NDC）。这些特性使得MoS₂-BPN可分别沿扶手椅和锯齿形方向用作电流开关和NDC器件。
AI.motivation: 基于二维碳联苯网络（BPN）的实验实现及其拓扑结构向其他元素组的理论扩展，作者旨在揭示原始MoS₂-BPN的电子、热、热电输运性质及电流-电压行为，探索其在不同方向上的潜在纳米电子应用。
AI.method: 采用密度泛函理论（DFT）结合非平衡格林函数（NEGF）形式，进行第一性原理和量子输运计算，分析MoS₂-BPN沿扶手椅和锯齿形方向的电子、热、热电性能及I-V特性。
AI.result: 室温下声子热导沿扶手椅和锯齿形方向分别为0.28 nW/K和0.23 nW/K；热电优值zT峰值分别为0.27和0.19；I-V特性显示极强的输运各向异性，电流比I_armchair/I_zigzag≈7×10⁴，且锯齿形方向呈现明显的负微分电导（NDC）。
AI.conclusion: MoS₂-BPN沿不同方向可用于不同的纳米电子应用：扶手椅方向可作为可靠的电流开关，锯齿形方向可作为有源NDC器件。

title: In-situ total scattering investigation of crystalline ordering in amorphous ion-beam sputtered thin films for interferometric gravitational wave detectors
summary: Amorphous tantala is an important optical material used in a number of high-precision optical applications, including gravitational wave interferometry. In this paper, we study in-situ the structural changes that occur in amorphous ion-beam sputtered coatings during an annealing treatment by means of a synchrotron radiation scattering experiment. The scattering signal is measured as a function of time on a large range of the Q-space. X-Ray diffraction and Rietveld analysis are used to study crystallization during the annealing treatment, whereas pair distribution function analysis allows to inspect the structural changes occurring during the amorphous to crystalline transition. Our findings indicate that several structural rearrangements occur in parallel, namely a first quick establishment of a backbone structure in the cationic substructure appearing on a rather extended range (up to 100 Angstrom), followed by a progressive rearrangement of the oxygen atoms environment which gradually increases the crystallinity of the structure.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过同步辐射散射实验原位观测了非晶态离子束溅射氧化钽（tantala）涂层在退火过程中的结构变化，发现阳离子亚结构快速形成骨架结构（范围达100 Å），随后氧原子环境逐渐重排，导致结构结晶度逐步提高。
AI.motivation: 非晶态氧化钽在引力波干涉仪等高精度光学应用中至关重要，但其在退火处理过程中的结构演化机制尚不明确，理解这些变化有助于优化涂层性能、降低光学损耗。
AI.method: 使用同步辐射散射实验原位测量退火过程中的散射信号随时间变化（覆盖宽Q空间）；采用X射线衍射和Rietveld分析研究结晶过程；利用对分布函数（PDF）分析非晶到晶态转变中的结构变化。
AI.result: 发现两个并行的结构重排过程：（1）阳离子亚结构快速建立长程骨架结构（可达100 Å）；（2）氧原子环境随后逐步重排，使结构结晶度逐渐增加。
AI.conclusion: 非晶氧化钽的退火结晶不是单一过程，而是阳离子骨架快速形成与氧环境慢速有序化两个阶段协同作用的结果，这为优化光学涂层的热处理方法提供了微观结构层面的指导。

title: Approaching the Limit of Intrinsic Crystalline Thermal Insulation
summary: Crystalline materials with ultralow thermal conductivity ($κ$) are potential thermal barrier coatings or thermoelectrics, yet the discovery of ultralow-$κ$ materials remains inefficient due to the limitations of trial-and-error approaches. Herein, we propose a state-of-the-art high-throughput workflow that integrates universal machine learning interatomic potentials with high-fidelity phonon transport theories to accelerate the exploration of thermal insulators. Applying this approach, we identify dozens of crystalline materials with intrinsic room-temperature $κ$ values below 0.2 $\rm W m^{-1} K^{-1}$. Among them, we report and experimentally validate CsTlI$_4$, a record-breaking material with an ultralow $κ$ of 0.14 $\rm W m^{-1} K^{-1}$ at 300 K. Structural and bond analyses reveal that a hierarchical bonding framework, consisting of multi-coordinated Cs-I and antibonding Tl-I interactions, leads to weak chemical bonding and a soft lattice. These features reduce phonon group velocities, enhance phonon scattering, and induce strong vibrational mismatch between sublattices, collectively suppressing both particle-like phonon propagation and wave-like tunneling. Beyond this specific system, we establish physically interpretable descriptors based on interatomic force constants that correlate strongly with ultralow $κ$ and capture the role of bonding hierarchy and coordination environments in governing thermal transport. This work demonstrates a robust data-driven strategy for accelerating the discovery of thermal insulators and provides microscopic insight into how hierarchical bonding and strong anharmonicity cooperate to impede heat-carrying vibrations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合通用机器学习原子间势与高保真声子输运理论的高通量工作流，以加速探索超低热导率晶体材料。通过该方法发现了数十种室温热导率低于0.2 W m⁻¹ K⁻¹的材料，其中CsTlI₄创下了0.14 W m⁻¹ K⁻¹的记录，并揭示了层级键合框架导致弱化学键合和软晶格的微观机制。
AI.motivation: 传统试错法发现超低热导率材料效率低下，亟需高效的计算驱动策略来加速热绝缘体材料的探索。
AI.method: 提出高通量工作流，集成通用机器学习原子间势与高保真声子输运理论，结合结构/键合分析及基于原子间力常数的可解释描述符。
AI.result: 识别出数十种室温κ<0.2 W m⁻¹ K⁻¹的材料，其中CsTlI₄的实验验证κ为0.14 W m⁻¹ K⁻¹（300 K），为已知最低值之一。
AI.conclusion: 该工作展示了稳健的数据驱动策略可加速热绝缘体发现，并揭示了层级键合与强非谐性协同抑制热载流子振动的微观物理图像。
